  1607→// Request to create a stream.
  1608→func (s *Server) jsStreamCreateRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  1609→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  1610→		return
  1611→	}
  1612→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  1613→	if err != nil {
  1614→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  1615→		return
  1616→	}
  1617→
  1618→	var resp = JSApiStreamCreateResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamCreateResponseType}}
  1619→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  1620→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  1621→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1622→		return
  1623→	}
  1624→
  1625→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  1626→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1627→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  1628→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  1629→			return
  1630→		}
  1631→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  1632→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  1633→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1634→			return
  1635→		}
  1636→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  1637→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  1638→			return
  1639→		}
  1640→	}
  1641→
  1642→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  1643→		if doErr {
  1644→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  1645→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1646→		}
  1647→		return
  1648→	}
  1649→
  1650→	var cfg StreamConfigRequest
  1651→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &cfg); err != nil {
  1652→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  1653→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1654→		return
  1655→	}
  1656→
  1657→	// Initialize asset version metadata.
  1658→	setStaticStreamMetadata(&cfg.StreamConfig)
  1659→
  1660→	streamName := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  1661→	if streamName != cfg.Name {
  1662→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMismatchError()
  1663→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1664→		return
  1665→	}
  1666→
  1667→	// Check for path like separators in the name.
  1668→	if strings.ContainsAny(streamName, `\/`) {
  1669→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNameContainsPathSeparatorsError()
  1670→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1671→		return
  1672→	}
  1673→
  1674→	// Can't create a stream with a sealed state.
  1675→	if cfg.Sealed {
  1676→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamInvalidConfigError(fmt.Errorf("stream configuration for create can not be sealed"))
  1677→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1678→		return
  1679→	}
  1680→
  1681→	// If we are told to do mirror direct but are not mirroring, error.
  1682→	if cfg.MirrorDirect && cfg.Mirror == nil {
  1683→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamInvalidConfigError(fmt.Errorf("stream has no mirror but does have mirror direct"))
  1684→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1685→		return
  1686→	}
  1687→
  1688→	// Hand off to cluster for processing.
  1689→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1690→		s.jsClusteredStreamRequest(ci, acc, subject, reply, rmsg, &cfg)
  1691→		return
  1692→	}
  1693→
  1694→	if err := acc.jsNonClusteredStreamLimitsCheck(&cfg.StreamConfig); err != nil {
  1695→		resp.Error = err
  1696→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1697→		return
  1698→	}
  1699→
  1700→	mset, err := acc.addStreamPedantic(&cfg.StreamConfig, cfg.Pedantic)
  1701→	if err != nil {
  1702→		if IsNatsErr(err, JSStreamStoreFailedF) {
  1703→			s.Warnf("Stream create failed for '%s > %s': %v", acc, streamName, err)
  1704→			err = errStreamStoreFailed
  1705→		}
  1706→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamCreateError(err, Unless(err))
  1707→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1708→		return
  1709→	}
  1710→	msetCfg := mset.config()
  1711→	resp.StreamInfo = &StreamInfo{
  1712→		Created:   mset.createdTime(),
  1713→		State:     mset.state(),
  1714→		Config:    *setDynamicStreamMetadata(&msetCfg),
  1715→		TimeStamp: time.Now().UTC(),
  1716→		Mirror:    mset.mirrorInfo(),
  1717→		Sources:   mset.sourcesInfo(),
  1718→	}
  1719→	resp.DidCreate = true
  1720→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  1721→}
  1722→
  1723→// Request to update a stream.
  1724→func (s *Server) jsStreamUpdateRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  1725→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  1726→		return
  1727→	}
  1728→
  1729→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  1730→	if err != nil {
  1731→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  1732→		return
  1733→	}
  1734→
  1735→	var resp = JSApiStreamUpdateResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamUpdateResponseType}}
  1736→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  1737→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  1738→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1739→		return
  1740→	}
  1741→
  1742→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  1743→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1744→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  1745→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  1746→			return
  1747→		}
  1748→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  1749→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  1750→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1751→			return
  1752→		}
  1753→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  1754→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  1755→			return
  1756→		}
  1757→	}
  1758→
  1759→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  1760→		if doErr {
  1761→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  1762→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1763→		}
  1764→		return
  1765→	}
  1766→	var ncfg StreamConfigRequest
  1767→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &ncfg); err != nil {
  1768→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  1769→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1770→		return
  1771→	}
  1772→
  1773→	cfg, apiErr := s.checkStreamCfg(&ncfg.StreamConfig, acc, ncfg.Pedantic)
  1774→	if apiErr != nil {
  1775→		resp.Error = apiErr
  1776→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1777→		return
  1778→	}
  1779→
  1780→	streamName := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  1781→	if streamName != cfg.Name {
  1782→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMismatchError()
  1783→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1784→		return
  1785→	}
  1786→
  1787→	// Handle clustered version here.
  1788→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1789→		s.jsClusteredStreamUpdateRequest(ci, acc, subject, reply, copyBytes(rmsg), &cfg, nil, ncfg.Pedantic)
  1790→		return
  1791→	}
  1792→
  1793→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(streamName)
  1794→	if err != nil {
  1795→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  1796→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1797→		return
  1798→	}
  1799→	if mset.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  1800→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamOfflineReasonError(errors.New(mset.offlineReason))
  1801→		s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  1802→		return
  1803→	}
  1804→
  1805→	// Update asset version metadata.
  1806→	setStaticStreamMetadata(&cfg)
  1807→
  1808→	if err := mset.updatePedantic(&cfg, ncfg.Pedantic); err != nil {
  1809→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamUpdateError(err, Unless(err))
  1810→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1811→		return
  1812→	}
  1813→
  1814→	msetCfg := mset.config()
  1815→	resp.StreamInfo = &StreamInfo{
  1816→		Created:   mset.createdTime(),
  1817→		State:     mset.state(),
  1818→		Config:    *setDynamicStreamMetadata(&msetCfg),
  1819→		Domain:    s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain,
  1820→		Mirror:    mset.mirrorInfo(),
  1821→		Sources:   mset.sourcesInfo(),
  1822→		TimeStamp: time.Now().UTC(),
  1823→	}
  1824→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  1825→}
  1826→
  1827→// Request for the list of all stream names.
  1828→func (s *Server) jsStreamNamesRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  1829→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  1830→		return
  1831→	}
  1832→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  1833→	if err != nil {
  1834→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  1835→		return
  1836→	}
  1837→
  1838→	var resp = JSApiStreamNamesResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamNamesResponseType}}
  1839→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  1840→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  1841→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1842→		return
  1843→	}
  1844→
  1845→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  1846→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1847→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  1848→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  1849→			return
  1850→		}
  1851→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  1852→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  1853→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1854→			return
  1855→		}
  1856→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  1857→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  1858→			return
  1859→		}
  1860→	}
  1861→
  1862→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  1863→		if doErr {
  1864→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  1865→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1866→		}
  1867→		return
  1868→	}
  1869→
  1870→	var offset int
  1871→	var filter string
  1872→
  1873→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  1874→		var req JSApiStreamNamesRequest
  1875→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  1876→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  1877→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1878→			return
  1879→		}
  1880→		offset = req.Offset
  1881→		if req.Subject != _EMPTY_ {
  1882→			filter = req.Subject
  1883→		}
  1884→	}
  1885→
  1886→	// TODO(dlc) - Maybe hold these results for large results that we expect to be paged.
  1887→	// TODO(dlc) - If this list is long maybe do this in a Go routine?
  1888→	var numStreams int
  1889→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1890→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  1891→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  1892→			// TODO(dlc) - Debug or Warn?
  1893→			return
  1894→		}
  1895→		js.mu.RLock()
  1896→		for stream, sa := range cc.streams[acc.Name] {
  1897→			if IsNatsErr(sa.err, JSClusterNotAssignedErr) {
  1898→				continue
  1899→			}
  1900→			if filter != _EMPTY_ {
  1901→				// These could not have subjects auto-filled in since they are raw and unprocessed.
  1902→				if len(sa.Config.Subjects) == 0 {
  1903→					if SubjectsCollide(filter, sa.Config.Name) {
  1904→						resp.Streams = append(resp.Streams, stream)
  1905→					}
  1906→				} else {
  1907→					for _, subj := range sa.Config.Subjects {
  1908→						if SubjectsCollide(filter, subj) {
  1909→							resp.Streams = append(resp.Streams, stream)
  1910→							break
  1911→						}
  1912→					}
  1913→				}
  1914→			} else {
  1915→				resp.Streams = append(resp.Streams, stream)
  1916→			}
  1917→		}
  1918→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  1919→		if len(resp.Streams) > 1 {
  1920→			slices.Sort(resp.Streams)
  1921→		}
  1922→		numStreams = len(resp.Streams)
  1923→		if offset > numStreams {
  1924→			offset = numStreams
  1925→		}
  1926→		if offset > 0 {
  1927→			resp.Streams = resp.Streams[offset:]
  1928→		}
  1929→		if len(resp.Streams) > JSApiNamesLimit {
  1930→			resp.Streams = resp.Streams[:JSApiNamesLimit]
  1931→		}
  1932→	} else {
  1933→		msets := acc.filteredStreams(filter)
  1934→		// Since we page results order matters.
  1935→		if len(msets) > 1 {
  1936→			slices.SortFunc(msets, func(i, j *stream) int { return cmp.Compare(i.cfg.Name, j.cfg.Name) })
  1937→		}
  1938→
  1939→		numStreams = len(msets)
  1940→		if offset > numStreams {
  1941→			offset = numStreams
  1942→		}
  1943→
  1944→		for _, mset := range msets[offset:] {
  1945→			resp.Streams = append(resp.Streams, mset.cfg.Name)
  1946→			if len(resp.Streams) >= JSApiNamesLimit {
  1947→				break
  1948→			}
  1949→		}
  1950→	}
  1951→	resp.Total = numStreams
  1952→	resp.Limit = JSApiNamesLimit
  1953→	resp.Offset = offset
  1954→
  1955→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  1956→}
  1957→
  1958→// Request for the list of all detailed stream info.
  1959→// TODO(dlc) - combine with above long term
  1960→func (s *Server) jsStreamListRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  1961→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  1962→		return
  1963→	}
  1964→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  1965→	if err != nil {
  1966→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  1967→		return
  1968→	}
  1969→
  1970→	var resp = JSApiStreamListResponse{
  1971→		ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamListResponseType},
  1972→		Streams:     []*StreamInfo{},
  1973→	}
  1974→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  1975→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  1976→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1977→		return
  1978→	}
  1979→
  1980→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  1981→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  1982→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  1983→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  1984→			return
  1985→		}
  1986→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  1987→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  1988→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  1989→			return
  1990→		}
  1991→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  1992→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  1993→			return
  1994→		}
  1995→	}
  1996→
  1997→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  1998→		if doErr {
  1999→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  2000→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2001→		}
  2002→		return
  2003→	}
  2004→
  2005→	var offset int
  2006→	var filter string
  2007→
  2008→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  2009→		var req JSApiStreamListRequest
  2010→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  2011→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  2012→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2013→			return
  2014→		}
  2015→		offset = req.Offset
  2016→		if req.Subject != _EMPTY_ {
  2017→			filter = req.Subject
  2018→		}
  2019→	}
  2020→
  2021→	// Clustered mode will invoke a scatter and gather.
  2022→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  2023→		// Need to copy these off before sending.. don't move this inside startGoRoutine!!!
  2024→		msg = copyBytes(msg)
  2025→		s.startGoRoutine(func() { s.jsClusteredStreamListRequest(acc, ci, filter, offset, subject, reply, msg) })
  2026→		return
  2027→	}
  2028→
  2029→	// TODO(dlc) - Maybe hold these results for large results that we expect to be paged.
  2030→	// TODO(dlc) - If this list is long maybe do this in a Go routine?
  2031→	var msets []*stream
  2032→	if filter == _EMPTY_ {
  2033→		msets = acc.streams()
  2034→	} else {
  2035→		msets = acc.filteredStreams(filter)
  2036→	}
  2037→
  2038→	slices.SortFunc(msets, func(i, j *stream) int { return cmp.Compare(i.cfg.Name, j.cfg.Name) })
  2039→
  2040→	scnt := len(msets)
  2041→	if offset > scnt {
  2042→		offset = scnt
  2043→	}
  2044→
  2045→	var missingNames []string
  2046→	for _, mset := range msets[offset:] {
  2047→		if mset.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  2048→			if resp.Offline == nil {
  2049→				resp.Offline = make(map[string]string, 1)
  2050→			}
  2051→			resp.Offline[mset.getCfgName()] = mset.offlineReason
  2052→			missingNames = append(missingNames, mset.getCfgName())
  2053→			continue
  2054→		}
  2055→
  2056→		config := mset.config()
  2057→		resp.Streams = append(resp.Streams, &StreamInfo{
  2058→			Created:   mset.createdTime(),
  2059→			State:     mset.state(),
  2060→			Config:    config,
  2061→			Domain:    s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain,
  2062→			Mirror:    mset.mirrorInfo(),
  2063→			Sources:   mset.sourcesInfo(),
  2064→			TimeStamp: time.Now().UTC(),
  2065→		})
  2066→		if len(resp.Streams) >= JSApiListLimit {
  2067→			break
  2068→		}
  2069→	}
  2070→	resp.Total = scnt
  2071→	resp.Limit = JSApiListLimit
  2072→	resp.Offset = offset
  2073→	resp.Missing = missingNames
  2074→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  2075→}

  2077→// Request for information about a stream.
  2078→func (s *Server) jsStreamInfoRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, a *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  2079→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  2080→		return
  2081→	}
  2082→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  2083→	if err != nil {
  2084→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  2085→		return
  2086→	}
  2087→
  2088→	streamName := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  2089→
  2090→	var resp = JSApiStreamInfoResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamInfoResponseType}}
  2091→
  2092→	// If someone creates a duplicate stream that is identical we will get this request forwarded to us.
  2093→	// Make sure the response type is for a create call.
  2094→	if rt := getHeader(JSResponseType, hdr); len(rt) > 0 && string(rt) == jsCreateResponse {
  2095→		resp.ApiResponse.Type = JSApiStreamCreateResponseType
  2096→	}
  2097→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  2098→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  2099→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2100→		return
  2101→	}
  2102→
  2103→	var clusterWideConsCount int
  2104→
  2105→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  2106→	if js == nil {
  2107→		return
  2108→	}
  2109→	// If we are in clustered mode we need to be the stream leader to proceed.
  2110→	if cc != nil {
  2111→		// Check to make sure the stream is assigned.
  2112→		js.mu.RLock()
  2113→		isLeader, sa := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, streamName)
  2114→		var offline bool
  2115→		if sa != nil {
  2116→			clusterWideConsCount = len(sa.consumers)
  2117→			offline = s.allPeersOffline(sa.Group)
  2118→			if sa.unsupported != nil && sa.Group != nil && cc.meta != nil && sa.Group.isMember(cc.meta.ID()) {
  2119→				// If we're a member for this stream, and it's not supported, report it as offline.
  2120→				resp.Error = NewJSStreamOfflineReasonError(errors.New(sa.unsupported.reason))
  2121→				s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  2122→				js.mu.RUnlock()
  2123→				return
  2124→			}
  2125→		}
  2126→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  2127→
  2128→		if isLeader && sa == nil {
  2129→			// We can't find the stream, so mimic what would be the errors below.
  2130→			if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  2131→				if doErr {
  2132→					resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  2133→					s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2134→				}
  2135→				return
  2136→			}
  2137→			// No stream present.
  2138→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  2139→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2140→			return
  2141→		} else if sa == nil {
  2142→			if js.isLeaderless() {
  2143→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  2144→				// Delaying an error response gives the leader a chance to respond before us
  2145→				s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  2146→			}
  2147→			return
  2148→		} else if isLeader && offline {
  2149→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamOfflineError()
  2150→			s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  2151→			return
  2152→		}
  2153→
  2154→		// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  2155→		isLeaderless := js.isGroupLeaderless(sa.Group)
  2156→
  2157→		// We have the stream assigned and a leader, so only the stream leader should answer.
  2158→		if !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(streamName) && !isLeaderless {
  2159→			if js.isLeaderless() {
  2160→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  2161→				// Delaying an error response gives the leader a chance to respond before us
  2162→				s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), sa.Group, errRespDelay)
  2163→				return
  2164→			}
  2165→
  2166→			// We may be in process of electing a leader, but if this is a scale up from 1 we will still be the state leader
  2167→			// while the new members work through the election and catchup process.
  2168→			// Double check for that instead of exiting here and being silent. e.g. nats stream update test --replicas=3
  2169→			js.mu.RLock()
  2170→			rg := sa.Group
  2171→			var ourID string
  2172→			if cc.meta != nil {
  2173→				ourID = cc.meta.ID()
  2174→			}
  2175→			// We have seen cases where rg is nil at this point,
  2176→			// so check explicitly and bail if that is the case.
  2177→			bail := rg == nil || !rg.isMember(ourID)
  2178→			if !bail {
  2179→				// We know we are a member here, if this group is new and we are preferred allow us to answer.
  2180→				// Also, we have seen cases where rg.node is nil at this point,
  2181→				// so check explicitly and bail if that is the case.
  2182→				bail = rg.Preferred != ourID || (rg.node != nil && time.Since(rg.node.Created()) > lostQuorumIntervalDefault)
  2183→			}
  2184→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  2185→			if bail {
  2186→				return
  2187→			}
  2188→		}
  2189→	}
  2190→
  2191→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  2192→		if doErr {
  2193→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  2194→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2195→		}
  2196→		return
  2197→	}
  2198→
  2199→	var details bool
  2200→	var subjects string
  2201→	var offset int
  2202→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  2203→		var req JSApiStreamInfoRequest
  2204→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  2205→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  2206→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2207→			return
  2208→		}
  2209→		details, subjects = req.DeletedDetails, req.SubjectsFilter
  2210→		offset = req.Offset
  2211→	}
  2212→
  2213→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(streamName)
  2214→	// Error is not to be expected at this point, but could happen if same stream trying to be created.
  2215→	if err != nil {
  2216→		if cc != nil {
  2217→			// This could be inflight, pause for a short bit and try again.
  2218→			// This will not be inline, so ok.
  2219→			time.Sleep(10 * time.Millisecond)
  2220→			mset, err = acc.lookupStream(streamName)
  2221→		}
  2222→		// Check again.
  2223→		if err != nil {
  2224→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  2225→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2226→			return
  2227→		}
  2228→	}
  2229→
  2230→	if mset.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  2231→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamOfflineReasonError(errors.New(mset.offlineReason))
  2232→		s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  2233→		return
  2234→	}
  2235→
  2236→	config := mset.config()
  2237→	resp.StreamInfo = &StreamInfo{
  2238→		Created:    mset.createdTime(),
  2239→		State:      mset.stateWithDetail(details),
  2240→		Config:     *setDynamicStreamMetadata(&config),
  2241→		Domain:     s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain,
  2242→		Cluster:    js.clusterInfo(mset.raftGroup()),
  2243→		Mirror:     mset.mirrorInfo(),
  2244→		Sources:    mset.sourcesInfo(),
  2245→		Alternates: js.streamAlternates(ci, config.Name),
  2246→		TimeStamp:  time.Now().UTC(),
  2247→	}
  2248→	if clusterWideConsCount > 0 {
  2249→		resp.StreamInfo.State.Consumers = clusterWideConsCount
  2250→	}
  2251→
  2252→	// Check if they have asked for subject details.
  2253→	if subjects != _EMPTY_ {
  2254→		st := mset.store.SubjectsTotals(subjects)
  2255→		if lst := len(st); lst > 0 {
  2256→			// Common for both cases.
  2257→			resp.Offset = offset
  2258→			resp.Limit = JSMaxSubjectDetails
  2259→			resp.Total = lst
  2260→
  2261→			if offset == 0 && lst <= JSMaxSubjectDetails {
  2262→				resp.StreamInfo.State.Subjects = st
  2263→			} else {
  2264→				// Here we have to filter list due to offset or maximum constraints.
  2265→				subjs := make([]string, 0, len(st))
  2266→				for subj := range st {
  2267→					subjs = append(subjs, subj)
  2268→				}
  2269→				// Sort it
  2270→				slices.Sort(subjs)
  2271→
  2272→				if offset > len(subjs) {
  2273→					offset = len(subjs)
  2274→				}
  2275→
  2276→				end := offset + JSMaxSubjectDetails
  2277→				if end > len(subjs) {
  2278→					end = len(subjs)
  2279→				}
  2280→				actualSize := end - offset
  2281→				var sd map[string]uint64
  2282→
  2283→				if actualSize > 0 {
  2284→					sd = make(map[string]uint64, actualSize)
  2285→					for _, ss := range subjs[offset:end] {
  2286→						sd[ss] = st[ss]
  2287→					}
  2288→				}
  2289→				resp.StreamInfo.State.Subjects = sd
  2290→			}
  2291→		}
  2292→	}
  2293→	// Check for out of band catchups.
  2294→	if mset.hasCatchupPeers() {
  2295→		mset.checkClusterInfo(resp.StreamInfo.Cluster)
  2296→	}
  2297→
  2298→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  2299→}
  2300→
  2301→// Request to have a stream leader stepdown.
  2302→func (s *Server) jsStreamLeaderStepDownRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  2303→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  2304→		return
  2305→	}
  2306→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  2307→	if err != nil {
  2308→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  2309→		return
  2310→	}
  2311→
  2312→	// Have extra token for this one.
  2313→	name := tokenAt(subject, 6)
  2314→
  2315→	var resp = JSApiStreamLeaderStepDownResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamLeaderStepDownResponseType}}
  2316→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  2317→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  2318→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2319→		return
  2320→	}
  2321→
  2322→	// If we are not in clustered mode this is a failed request.
  2323→	if !s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  2324→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterRequiredError()

  2326→		return
  2327→	}
  2328→
  2329→	// If we are here we are clustered. See if we are the stream leader in order to proceed.
  2330→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  2331→	if js == nil || cc == nil {
  2332→		return
  2333→	}
  2334→	if js.isLeaderless() {
  2335→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  2336→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2337→		return
  2338→	}
  2339→
  2340→	js.mu.RLock()
  2341→	isLeader, sa := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, name)
  2342→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2343→
  2344→	if isLeader && sa == nil {
  2345→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  2346→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2347→		return
  2348→	} else if sa == nil {
  2349→		return
  2350→	}
  2351→
  2352→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  2353→		if doErr {
  2354→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  2355→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2356→		}
  2357→		return
  2358→	}
  2359→
  2360→	// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  2361→	if js.isGroupLeaderless(sa.Group) {
  2362→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  2363→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2364→		return
  2365→	}
  2366→
  2367→	// We have the stream assigned and a leader, so only the stream leader should answer.
  2368→	if !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(name) {
  2369→		return
  2370→	}
  2371→
  2372→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(name)
  2373→	if err != nil {
  2374→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  2375→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2376→		return
  2377→	}
  2378→
  2379→	if mset == nil {
  2380→		resp.Success = true
  2381→		s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  2382→		return
  2383→	}
  2384→
  2385→	node := mset.raftNode()
  2386→	if node == nil {
  2387→		resp.Success = true
  2388→		s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  2389→		return
  2390→	}
  2391→
  2392→	var preferredLeader string
  2393→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  2394→		var req JSApiLeaderStepdownRequest
  2395→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  2396→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  2397→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2398→			return
  2399→		}
  2400→		if preferredLeader, resp.Error = s.getStepDownPreferredPlacement(node, req.Placement); resp.Error != nil {
  2401→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2402→			return
  2403→		}
  2404→	}
  2405→
  2406→	// Call actual stepdown.
  2407→	err = node.StepDown(preferredLeader)

  2410→	} else {

  2412→	}
  2413→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  2414→}

  2416→// Request to have a consumer leader stepdown.

  2539→// Request to remove a peer from a clustered stream.
  2540→func (s *Server) jsStreamRemovePeerRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  2541→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  2542→		return
  2543→	}
  2544→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  2545→	if err != nil {
  2546→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  2547→		return
  2548→	}
  2549→
  2550→	// Have extra token for this one.
  2551→	name := tokenAt(subject, 6)
  2552→
  2553→	var resp = JSApiStreamRemovePeerResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamRemovePeerResponseType}}
  2554→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  2555→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  2556→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2557→		return
  2558→	}
  2559→
  2560→	// If we are not in clustered mode this is a failed request.
  2561→	if !s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  2562→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterRequiredError()
  2563→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2564→		return
  2565→	}
  2566→
  2567→	// If we are here we are clustered. See if we are the stream leader in order to proceed.
  2568→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  2569→	if js == nil || cc == nil {
  2570→		return
  2571→	}
  2572→	if js.isLeaderless() {
  2573→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  2574→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2575→		return
  2576→	}
  2577→
  2578→	js.mu.RLock()
  2579→	isLeader, sa := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, name)
  2580→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2581→
  2582→	// Make sure we are meta leader.
  2583→	if !isLeader {
  2584→		return
  2585→	}
  2586→
  2587→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  2588→		if doErr {
  2589→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  2590→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2591→		}
  2592→		return
  2593→	}
  2594→	if isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  2595→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  2596→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2597→		return
  2598→	}
  2599→
  2600→	var req JSApiStreamRemovePeerRequest
  2601→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  2602→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  2603→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2604→		return
  2605→	}
  2606→	if req.Peer == _EMPTY_ {
  2607→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  2608→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2609→		return
  2610→	}
  2611→
  2612→	if sa == nil {
  2613→		// No stream present.
  2614→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  2615→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2616→		return
  2617→	}
  2618→
  2619→	// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  2620→	// Peers here is a server name, convert to node name.
  2621→	nodeName := getHash(req.Peer)
  2622→
  2623→	js.mu.RLock()
  2624→	rg := sa.Group
  2625→	isMember := rg.isMember(nodeName)
  2626→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2627→
  2628→	// Make sure we are a member.
  2629→	if !isMember {
  2630→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterPeerNotMemberError()
  2631→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2632→		return
  2633→	}
  2634→
  2635→	// If we are here we have a valid peer member set for removal.
  2636→	if !js.removePeerFromStream(sa, nodeName) {
  2637→		resp.Error = NewJSPeerRemapError()
  2638→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2639→		return
  2640→	}
  2641→
  2642→	resp.Success = true
  2643→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  2644→}

  2646→// Request to have the metaleader remove a peer from the system.
  2647→func (s *Server) jsLeaderServerRemoveRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  2648→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  2649→		return
  2650→	}
  2651→
  2652→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  2653→	if err != nil {
  2654→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  2655→		return
  2656→	}
  2657→	if acc != s.SystemAccount() {
  2658→		return
  2659→	}
  2660→
  2661→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  2662→	if js == nil || cc == nil || cc.meta == nil {
  2663→		return
  2664→	}
  2665→
  2666→	// Extra checks here but only leader is listening.
  2667→	js.mu.RLock()
  2668→	isLeader := cc.isLeader()
  2669→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2670→
  2671→	if !isLeader {
  2672→		return
  2673→	}
  2674→
  2675→	var resp = JSApiMetaServerRemoveResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiMetaServerRemoveResponseType}}
  2676→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  2677→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  2678→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2679→		return
  2680→	}
  2681→
  2682→	if isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  2683→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  2684→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2685→		return
  2686→	}
  2687→
  2688→	var req JSApiMetaServerRemoveRequest
  2689→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  2690→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  2691→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2692→		return
  2693→	}
  2694→
  2695→	var found string
  2696→	js.mu.RLock()
  2697→	for _, p := range cc.meta.Peers() {
  2698→		// If Peer is specified, it takes precedence
  2699→		if req.Peer != _EMPTY_ {
  2700→			if p.ID == req.Peer {
  2701→				found = req.Peer
  2702→				break
  2703→			}
  2704→			continue
  2705→		}
  2706→		si, ok := s.nodeToInfo.Load(p.ID)
  2707→		if ok && si.(nodeInfo).name == req.Server {
  2708→			found = p.ID
  2709→			break
  2710→		}
  2711→	}
  2712→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2713→
  2714→	if found == _EMPTY_ {
  2715→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterServerNotMemberError()
  2716→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2717→		return
  2718→	}
  2719→
  2720→	// So we have a valid peer.
  2721→	js.mu.Lock()
  2722→	cc.meta.ProposeRemovePeer(found)
  2723→	js.mu.Unlock()
  2724→
  2725→	resp.Success = true
  2726→	s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2727→}
  2728→
  2729→func (s *Server) peerSetToNames(ps []string) []string {
  2730→	names := make([]string, len(ps))
  2731→	for i := 0; i < len(ps); i++ {
  2732→		if si, ok := s.nodeToInfo.Load(ps[i]); !ok {
  2733→			names[i] = ps[i]
  2734→		} else {
  2735→			names[i] = si.(nodeInfo).name
  2736→		}
  2737→	}
  2738→	return names
  2739→}
  2740→
  2741→// looks up the peer id for a given server name. Cluster and domain name are optional filter criteria
  2742→func (s *Server) nameToPeer(js *jetStream, serverName, clusterName, domainName string) string {
  2743→	js.mu.RLock()
  2744→	defer js.mu.RUnlock()
  2745→	if cc := js.cluster; cc != nil {
  2746→		for _, p := range cc.meta.Peers() {
  2747→			si, ok := s.nodeToInfo.Load(p.ID)
  2748→			if ok && si.(nodeInfo).name == serverName {
  2749→				if clusterName == _EMPTY_ || clusterName == si.(nodeInfo).cluster {
  2750→					if domainName == _EMPTY_ || domainName == si.(nodeInfo).domain {
  2751→						return p.ID
  2752→					}
  2753→				}
  2754→			}
  2755→		}
  2756→	}
  2757→	return _EMPTY_
  2758→}

  2760→// Request to have the metaleader move a stream on a peer to another
  2761→func (s *Server) jsLeaderServerStreamMoveRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  2762→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  2763→		return
  2764→	}
  2765→
  2766→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  2767→	if err != nil {
  2768→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  2769→		return
  2770→	}
  2771→
  2772→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  2773→	if js == nil || cc == nil || cc.meta == nil {
  2774→		return
  2775→	}
  2776→
  2777→	// Extra checks here but only leader is listening.
  2778→	js.mu.RLock()
  2779→	isLeader := cc.isLeader()
  2780→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2781→
  2782→	if !isLeader {
  2783→		return
  2784→	}
  2785→
  2786→	accName := tokenAt(subject, 6)
  2787→	streamName := tokenAt(subject, 7)
  2788→
  2789→	if acc.GetName() != accName && acc != s.SystemAccount() {
  2790→		return
  2791→	}
  2792→
  2793→	var resp = JSApiStreamUpdateResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamUpdateResponseType}}
  2794→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  2795→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  2796→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2797→		return
  2798→	}
  2799→
  2800→	var req JSApiMetaServerStreamMoveRequest
  2801→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  2802→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  2803→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2804→		return
  2805→	}
  2806→
  2807→	srcPeer := _EMPTY_
  2808→	if req.Server != _EMPTY_ {
  2809→		srcPeer = s.nameToPeer(js, req.Server, req.Cluster, req.Domain)
  2810→	}
  2811→
  2812→	targetAcc, ok := s.accounts.Load(accName)
  2813→	if !ok {
  2814→		resp.Error = NewJSNoAccountError()
  2815→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2816→		return
  2817→	}
  2818→
  2819→	var streamFound bool
  2820→	cfg := StreamConfig{}
  2821→	currPeers := []string{}
  2822→	currCluster := _EMPTY_
  2823→	js.mu.Lock()
  2824→	streams, ok := cc.streams[accName]
  2825→	if ok {
  2826→		sa, ok := streams[streamName]
  2827→		if ok {
  2828→			cfg = *sa.Config.clone()
  2829→			streamFound = true
  2830→			currPeers = sa.Group.Peers
  2831→			currCluster = sa.Group.Cluster
  2832→		}
  2833→	}
  2834→	js.mu.Unlock()
  2835→
  2836→	if !streamFound {
  2837→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  2838→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2839→		return
  2840→	}
  2841→
  2842→	// if server was picked, make sure src peer exists and move it to first position.
  2843→	// removal will drop peers from the left
  2844→	if req.Server != _EMPTY_ {
  2845→		if srcPeer == _EMPTY_ {
  2846→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterServerNotMemberError()
  2847→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2848→			return
  2849→		}
  2850→		var peerFound bool
  2851→		for i := 0; i < len(currPeers); i++ {
  2852→			if currPeers[i] == srcPeer {
  2853→				copy(currPeers[1:], currPeers[:i])
  2854→				currPeers[0] = srcPeer
  2855→				peerFound = true
  2856→				break
  2857→			}
  2858→		}
  2859→		if !peerFound {
  2860→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterPeerNotMemberError()
  2861→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2862→			return
  2863→		}
  2864→	}
  2865→
  2866→	// make sure client is scoped to requested account
  2867→	ciNew := *(ci)
  2868→	ciNew.Account = accName
  2869→
  2870→	// backup placement such that peers can be looked up with modified tag list
  2871→	var origPlacement *Placement
  2872→	if cfg.Placement != nil {
  2873→		tmp := *cfg.Placement
  2874→		origPlacement = &tmp
  2875→	}
  2876→
  2877→	if len(req.Tags) > 0 {
  2878→		if cfg.Placement == nil {
  2879→			cfg.Placement = &Placement{}
  2880→		}
  2881→		cfg.Placement.Tags = append(cfg.Placement.Tags, req.Tags...)
  2882→	}
  2883→
  2884→	peers, e := cc.selectPeerGroup(cfg.Replicas+1, currCluster, &cfg, currPeers, 1, nil)
  2885→	if len(peers) <= cfg.Replicas {
  2886→		// since expanding in the same cluster did not yield a result, try in different cluster
  2887→		peers = nil
  2888→
  2889→		clusters := map[string]struct{}{}
  2890→		s.nodeToInfo.Range(func(_, ni any) bool {
  2891→			if currCluster != ni.(nodeInfo).cluster {
  2892→				clusters[ni.(nodeInfo).cluster] = struct{}{}
  2893→			}
  2894→			return true
  2895→		})
  2896→		errs := &selectPeerError{}
  2897→		errs.accumulate(e)
  2898→		for cluster := range clusters {
  2899→			newPeers, e := cc.selectPeerGroup(cfg.Replicas, cluster, &cfg, nil, 0, nil)
  2900→			if len(newPeers) >= cfg.Replicas {
  2901→				peers = append([]string{}, currPeers...)
  2902→				peers = append(peers, newPeers[:cfg.Replicas]...)
  2903→				break
  2904→			}
  2905→			errs.accumulate(e)
  2906→		}
  2907→		if peers == nil {
  2908→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNoPeersError(errs)
  2909→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2910→			return
  2911→		}
  2912→	}
  2913→
  2914→	cfg.Placement = origPlacement
  2915→
  2916→	s.Noticef("Requested move for stream '%s > %s' R=%d from %+v to %+v",
  2917→		accName, streamName, cfg.Replicas, s.peerSetToNames(currPeers), s.peerSetToNames(peers))
  2918→
  2919→	// We will always have peers and therefore never do a callout, therefore it is safe to call inline
  2920→	// We should be fine ignoring pedantic mode here. as we do not touch configuration.
  2921→	s.jsClusteredStreamUpdateRequest(&ciNew, targetAcc.(*Account), subject, reply, rmsg, &cfg, peers, false)
  2922→}
  2923→
  2924→// Request to have the metaleader move a stream on a peer to another
  2925→func (s *Server) jsLeaderServerStreamCancelMoveRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  2926→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  2927→		return
  2928→	}
  2929→
  2930→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  2931→	if err != nil {
  2932→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  2933→		return
  2934→	}
  2935→
  2936→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  2937→	if js == nil || cc == nil || cc.meta == nil {
  2938→		return
  2939→	}
  2940→
  2941→	// Extra checks here but only leader is listening.
  2942→	js.mu.RLock()
  2943→	isLeader := cc.isLeader()
  2944→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  2945→
  2946→	if !isLeader {
  2947→		return
  2948→	}
  2949→
  2950→	var resp = JSApiStreamUpdateResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamUpdateResponseType}}
  2951→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  2952→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  2953→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2954→		return
  2955→	}
  2956→
  2957→	accName := tokenAt(subject, 6)
  2958→	streamName := tokenAt(subject, 7)
  2959→
  2960→	if acc.GetName() != accName && acc != s.SystemAccount() {
  2961→		return
  2962→	}
  2963→
  2964→	targetAcc, ok := s.accounts.Load(accName)
  2965→	if !ok {
  2966→		resp.Error = NewJSNoAccountError()
  2967→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2968→		return
  2969→	}
  2970→
  2971→	streamFound := false
  2972→	cfg := StreamConfig{}
  2973→	currPeers := []string{}
  2974→	js.mu.Lock()
  2975→	streams, ok := cc.streams[accName]
  2976→	if ok {
  2977→		sa, ok := streams[streamName]
  2978→		if ok {
  2979→			cfg = *sa.Config.clone()
  2980→			streamFound = true
  2981→			currPeers = sa.Group.Peers
  2982→		}
  2983→	}
  2984→	js.mu.Unlock()
  2985→
  2986→	if !streamFound {
  2987→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  2988→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2989→		return
  2990→	}
  2991→
  2992→	if len(currPeers) <= cfg.Replicas {
  2993→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMoveNotInProgressError()
  2994→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  2995→		return
  2996→	}
  2997→
  2998→	// make sure client is scoped to requested account
  2999→	ciNew := *(ci)
  3000→	ciNew.Account = accName
  3001→
  3002→	peers := currPeers[:cfg.Replicas]
  3003→
  3004→	// Remove placement in case tags don't match
  3005→	// This can happen if the move was initiated by modifying the tags.
  3006→	// This is an account operation.
  3007→	// This can NOT happen when the move was initiated by the system account.
  3008→	// There move honors the original tag list.
  3009→	if cfg.Placement != nil && len(cfg.Placement.Tags) != 0 {
  3010→	FOR_TAGCHECK:
  3011→		for _, peer := range peers {
  3012→			si, ok := s.nodeToInfo.Load(peer)
  3013→			if !ok {
  3014→				// can't verify tags, do the safe thing and error
  3015→				resp.Error = NewJSStreamGeneralError(
  3016→					fmt.Errorf("peer %s not present for tag validation", peer))
  3017→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3018→				return
  3019→			}
  3020→			nodeTags := si.(nodeInfo).tags
  3021→			for _, tag := range cfg.Placement.Tags {
  3022→				if !nodeTags.Contains(tag) {
  3023→					// clear placement as tags don't match
  3024→					cfg.Placement = nil
  3025→					break FOR_TAGCHECK
  3026→				}
  3027→			}
  3028→
  3029→		}
  3030→	}
  3031→
  3032→	s.Noticef("Requested cancel of move: R=%d '%s > %s' to peer set %+v and restore previous peer set %+v",
  3033→		cfg.Replicas, accName, streamName, s.peerSetToNames(currPeers), s.peerSetToNames(peers))
  3034→
  3035→	// We will always have peers and therefore never do a callout, therefore it is safe to call inline
  3036→	s.jsClusteredStreamUpdateRequest(&ciNew, targetAcc.(*Account), subject, reply, rmsg, &cfg, peers, false)
  3037→}

  3039→// Request to have an account purged
  3040→func (s *Server) jsLeaderAccountPurgeRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3041→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3042→		return
  3043→	}
  3044→
  3045→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3046→	if err != nil {
  3047→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3048→		return
  3049→	}
  3050→	if acc != s.SystemAccount() {
  3051→		return
  3052→	}
  3053→
  3054→	js := s.getJetStream()
  3055→	if js == nil {
  3056→		return
  3057→	}
  3058→
  3059→	accName := tokenAt(subject, 5)
  3060→
  3061→	var resp = JSApiAccountPurgeResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiAccountPurgeResponseType}}
  3062→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3063→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3064→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3065→		return
  3066→	}
  3067→
  3068→	if !s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3069→		var streams []*stream
  3070→		var ac *Account
  3071→		if ac, err = s.lookupAccount(accName); err == nil && ac != nil {
  3072→			streams = ac.streams()
  3073→		}
  3074→
  3075→		s.Noticef("Purge request for account %s (streams: %d, hasAccount: %t)",
  3076→			accName, len(streams), ac != nil)
  3077→
  3078→		for _, mset := range streams {
  3079→			err := mset.delete()
  3080→			if err != nil {
  3081→				resp.Error = NewJSStreamDeleteError(err)
  3082→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3083→				return
  3084→			}
  3085→		}
  3086→		if err := os.RemoveAll(filepath.Join(js.config.StoreDir, accName)); err != nil {
  3087→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamGeneralError(err)
  3088→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3089→			return
  3090→		}
  3091→		resp.Initiated = true
  3092→		s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3093→		return
  3094→	}
  3095→
  3096→	_, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3097→	if cc == nil || cc.meta == nil || !cc.isLeader() {
  3098→		return
  3099→	}
  3100→
  3101→	if js.isMetaRecovering() {
  3102→		// While in recovery mode, the data structures are not fully initialized
  3103→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3104→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3105→		return
  3106→	}
  3107→
  3108→	js.mu.RLock()
  3109→	ns, nc := 0, 0
  3110→	streams, hasAccount := cc.streams[accName]
  3111→	for _, osa := range streams {
  3112→		for _, oca := range osa.consumers {
  3113→			oca.deleted = true
  3114→			ca := &consumerAssignment{Group: oca.Group, Stream: oca.Stream, Name: oca.Name, Config: oca.Config, Subject: subject, Client: oca.Client}
  3115→			cc.meta.Propose(encodeDeleteConsumerAssignment(ca))
  3116→			nc++
  3117→		}
  3118→		sa := &streamAssignment{Group: osa.Group, Config: osa.Config, Subject: subject, Client: osa.Client}
  3119→		cc.meta.Propose(encodeDeleteStreamAssignment(sa))
  3120→		ns++
  3121→	}
  3122→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  3123→
  3124→	s.Noticef("Purge request for account %s (streams: %d, consumer: %d, hasAccount: %t)", accName, ns, nc, hasAccount)
  3125→
  3126→	resp.Initiated = true
  3127→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3128→}

  3130→// Request to have the meta leader stepdown.
  3131→// These will only be received by the meta leader, so less checking needed.
  3132→func (s *Server) jsLeaderStepDownRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3133→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3134→		return
  3135→	}
  3136→
  3137→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3138→	if err != nil {
  3139→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3140→		return
  3141→	}
  3142→
  3143→	// This should only be coming from the System Account.
  3144→	if acc != s.SystemAccount() {
  3145→		s.RateLimitWarnf("JetStream API stepdown request from non-system account: %q user: %q", ci.serviceAccount(), ci.User)
  3146→		return
  3147→	}
  3148
  3149→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3150→	if js == nil || cc == nil || cc.meta == nil {
  3151→		return
  3152→	}
  3153→
  3154→	// Extra checks here but only leader is listening.
  3155→	js.mu.RLock()
  3156→	isLeader := cc.isLeader()
  3157→	js.mu.RUnlock()
  3158→
  3159→	if !isLeader {
  3160→		return
  3161→	}
  3162→
  3163→	var preferredLeader string
  3164→	var resp = JSApiLeaderStepDownResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiLeaderStepDownResponseType}}
  3165→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3166→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3167→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3168→		return
  3169→	}
  3170→
  3171→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  3172→		var req JSApiLeaderStepdownRequest
  3173→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  3174→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  3175→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3176→			return
  3177→		}
  3178→		if preferredLeader, resp.Error = s.getStepDownPreferredPlacement(cc.meta, req.Placement); resp.Error != nil {
  3179→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3180→			return
  3181→		}
  3182→	}
  3183→
  3184→	// Call actual stepdown.
  3185→	err = cc.meta.StepDown(preferredLeader)
  3186→	if err != nil {
  3187→		resp.Error = NewJSRaftGeneralError(err, Unless(err))
  3188→	} else {
  3189→		resp.Success = true
  3190→	}
  3191→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  3192→}
  3193→
  3194→// Check if given []bytes is a JSON Object or Array.
  3195→// Technically, valid JSON can also be a plain string or number, but for our use case,
  3196→// we care only for JSON objects or arrays which starts with `[` or `{`.
  3197→// This function does not have to ensure valid JSON in its entirety. It is used merely
  3198→// to hint the codepath if it should attempt to parse the request as JSON or not.
  3199→func isJSONObjectOrArray(req []byte) bool {
  3200→	// Skip leading JSON whitespace (space, tab, newline, carriage return)
  3201→	i := 0
  3202→	for i < len(req) && (req[i] == ' ' || req[i] == '\t' || req[i] == '\n' || req[i] == '\r') {
  3203→		i++
  3204→	}
  3205→	// Check for empty input after trimming
  3206→	if i >= len(req) {
  3207→		return false
  3208→	}
  3209→	// Check if the first non-whitespace character is '{' or '['
  3210→	return req[i] == '{' || req[i] == '['
  3211→}
  3212→
  3213→func isEmptyRequest(req []byte) bool {
  3214→	if len(req) == 0 {
  3215→		return true
  3216→	}
  3217→	if bytes.Equal(req, []byte("{}")) {
  3218→		return true
  3219→	}
  3220→	// If we are here we didn't get our simple match, but still could be valid.
  3221→	var v any
  3222→	if err := json.Unmarshal(req, &v); err != nil {
  3223→		return false
  3224→	}
  3225→	vm, ok := v.(map[string]any)
  3226→	if !ok {
  3227→		return false
  3228→	}
  3229→	return len(vm) == 0
  3230→}
  3231→
  3232→// getStepDownPreferredPlacement attempts to work out what the best placement is
  3233→// for a stepdown request. The preferred server name always takes precedence, but
  3234→// if not specified, the placement will be used to filter by cluster. The caller
  3235→// should check for return API errors and return those to the requestor if needed.
  3236→func (s *Server) getStepDownPreferredPlacement(group RaftNode, placement *Placement) (string, *ApiError) {
  3237→	if placement == nil {
  3238→		return _EMPTY_, nil
  3239→	}
  3240→	var preferredLeader string
  3241→	if placement.Preferred != _EMPTY_ {
  3242→		for _, p := range group.Peers() {
  3243→			si, ok := s.nodeToInfo.Load(p.ID)
  3244→			if !ok || si == nil {
  3245→				continue
  3246→			}
  3247→			if si.(nodeInfo).name == placement.Preferred {
  3248→				preferredLeader = p.ID
  3249→				break
  3250→			}
  3251→		}
  3252→		if preferredLeader == group.ID() {
  3253→			return _EMPTY_, NewJSClusterNoPeersError(fmt.Errorf("preferred server %q is already leader", placement.Preferred))
  3254→		}
  3255→		if preferredLeader == _EMPTY_ {
  3256→			return _EMPTY_, NewJSClusterNoPeersError(fmt.Errorf("preferred server %q not known", placement.Preferred))
  3257→		}
  3258→	} else {
  3259→		possiblePeers := make(map[*Peer]nodeInfo, len(group.Peers()))
  3260→		ourID := group.ID()
  3261→		for _, p := range group.Peers() {
  3262→			if p == nil {
  3263→				continue // ... shouldn't happen.
  3264→			}
  3265→			si, ok := s.nodeToInfo.Load(p.ID)
  3266→			if !ok || si == nil {
  3267→				continue
  3268→			}
  3269→			ni := si.(nodeInfo)
  3270→			if ni.offline || p.ID == ourID {
  3271→				continue
  3272→			}
  3273→			possiblePeers[p] = ni
  3274→		}
  3275→		// If cluster is specified, filter out anything not matching the cluster name.
  3276→		if placement.Cluster != _EMPTY_ {
  3277→			for p, si := range possiblePeers {
  3278→				if si.cluster != placement.Cluster {
  3279→					delete(possiblePeers, p)
  3280→				}
  3281→			}
  3282→		}
  3283→		// If tags are specified, filter out anything not matching all supplied tags.
  3284→		if len(placement.Tags) > 0 {
  3285→			for p, si := range possiblePeers {
  3286→				matchesAll := true
  3287→				for _, tag := range placement.Tags {
  3288→					if matchesAll = matchesAll && si.tags.Contains(tag); !matchesAll {
  3289→						break
  3290→					}
  3291→				}
  3292→				if !matchesAll {
  3293→					delete(possiblePeers, p)
  3294→				}
  3295→			}
  3296→		}
  3297→		// If there are no possible peers, return an error.
  3298→		if len(possiblePeers) == 0 {
  3299→			return _EMPTY_, NewJSClusterNoPeersError(fmt.Errorf("no replacement peer connected"))
  3300→		}
  3301→		// Take advantage of random map iteration order to select the preferred.
  3302→		for p := range possiblePeers {
  3303→			preferredLeader = p.ID
  3304→			break
  3305→		}
  3306→	}
  3307→	return preferredLeader, nil
  3308→}
  3309→
  3310→// Request to delete a stream.
  3311→func (s *Server) jsStreamDeleteRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3312→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3313→		return
  3314→	}
  3315→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3316→	if err != nil {
  3317→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3318→		return
  3319→	}
  3320→
  3321→	var resp = JSApiStreamDeleteResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamDeleteResponseType}}
  3322→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3323→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3324→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3325→		return
  3326→	}
  3327→
  3328→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  3329→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3330→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3331→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  3332→			return
  3333→		}
  3334→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  3335→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3336→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3337→			return
  3338→		}
  3339→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  3340→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  3341→			return
  3342		}
  3343→	}
  3344→
  3345→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3346→		if doErr {
  3347→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3348→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3349→		}
  3350→		return
  3351→	}
  3352→
  3353→	if !isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  3354→		resp.Error = NewJSNotEmptyRequestError()
  3355→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3356→		return
  3357→	}
  3358→	stream := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  3359→
  3360→	// Clustered.
  3361→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3362→		s.jsClusteredStreamDeleteRequest(ci, acc, stream, subject, reply, msg)
  3363→		return
  3364→	}
  3365→
  3366→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  3367→	if err != nil {
  3368→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  3369→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3370→		return
  3371→	}
  3372→
  3373→	if err := mset.delete(); err != nil {
  3374→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamDeleteError(err, Unless(err))
  3375→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3376→		return
  3377→	}
  3378→	resp.Success = true
  3379→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  3380→}

  3382→// Request to delete a message.
  3383→// This expects a stream sequence number as the msg body.
  3384→func (s *Server) jsMsgDeleteRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3385→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3386→		return
  3387→	}
  3388→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3389→	if err != nil {
  3390→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3391→		return
  3392→	}
  3393→
  3394→	stream := tokenAt(subject, 6)
  3395→
  3396→	var resp = JSApiMsgDeleteResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiMsgDeleteResponseType}}
  3397→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3398→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3399→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3400→		return
  3401→	}
  3402→
  3403→	// If we are in clustered mode we need to be the stream leader to proceed.
  3404→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3405→		// Check to make sure the stream is assigned.
  3406→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3407→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  3408→			return
  3409→		}
  3410→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  3411→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3412→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3413→			return
  3414→		}
  3415→
  3416→		js.mu.RLock()
  3417→		isLeader, sa := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, stream)
  3418→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  3419→
  3420→		if isLeader && sa == nil {
  3421→			// We can't find the stream, so mimic what would be the errors below.
  3422→			if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3423→				if doErr {
  3424→					resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3425→					s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3426→				}
  3427→				return
  3428→			}
  3429→			// No stream present.
  3430→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  3431→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3432→			return
  3433→		} else if sa == nil {
  3434→			return
  3435→		}
  3436→
  3437→		// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  3438→		if js.isGroupLeaderless(sa.Group) {
  3439→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3440→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3441→			return
  3442→		}
  3443→
  3444→		// We have the stream assigned and a leader, so only the stream leader should answer.
  3445→		if !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(stream) {
  3446→			return
  3447→		}
  3448→	}
  3449→
  3450→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3451→		if doErr {
  3452→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3453→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3454→		}
  3455→		return
  3456→	}
  3457→	if isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  3458→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  3459→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3460→		return
  3461→	}
  3462→	var req JSApiMsgDeleteRequest
  3463→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  3464→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  3465→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3466→		return
  3467→	}
  3468→
  3469→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  3470→	if err != nil {
  3471→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  3472→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3473→		return
  3474→	}
  3475→	if mset.cfg.Sealed {
  3476→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamSealedError()
  3477→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3478→		return
  3479→	}
  3480→	if mset.cfg.DenyDelete {
  3481→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMsgDeleteFailedError(errors.New("message delete not permitted"))
  3482→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3483→		return
  3484→	}
  3485→
  3486→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3487→		s.jsClusteredMsgDeleteRequest(ci, acc, mset, stream, subject, reply, &req, rmsg)
  3488→		return
  3489→	}
  3490→
  3491→	var removed bool
  3492→	if req.NoErase {
  3493→		removed, err = mset.removeMsg(req.Seq)
  3494→	} else {
  3495→		removed, err = mset.eraseMsg(req.Seq)
  3496→	}
  3497→	if err != nil {
  3498→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMsgDeleteFailedError(err, Unless(err))
  3499→	} else if !removed {
  3500→		resp.Error = NewJSSequenceNotFoundError(req.Seq)
  3501→	} else {
  3502→		resp.Success = true
  3503→	}
  3504→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  3505→}

  3507→// Request to get a raw stream message.
  3508→func (s *Server) jsMsgGetRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3509→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3510→		return
  3511→	}
  3512→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3513→	if err != nil {
  3514→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3515→		return
  3516→	}
  3517→
  3518→	stream := tokenAt(subject, 6)
  3519→
  3520→	var resp = JSApiMsgGetResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiMsgGetResponseType}}
  3521→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3522→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3523→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3524→		return
  3525→	}
  3526→
  3527→	// If we are in clustered mode we need to be the stream leader to proceed.
  3528→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3529→		// Check to make sure the stream is assigned.
  3530→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3531→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  3532→			return
  3533→		}
  3534→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  3535→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3536→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3537→			return
  3538→		}
  3539→
  3540→		js.mu.RLock()
  3541→		isLeader, sa := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, stream)
  3542→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  3543→
  3544→		if isLeader && sa == nil {
  3545→			// We can't find the stream, so mimic what would be the errors below.
  3546→			if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3547→				if doErr {
  3548→					resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3549→					s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3550→				}
  3551→				return
  3552→			}
  3553→			// No stream present.
  3554→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  3555→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3556→			return
  3557→		} else if sa == nil {
  3558→			return
  3559→		}
  3560→
  3561→		// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  3562→		if js.isGroupLeaderless(sa.Group) {
  3563→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3564→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3565→			return
  3566→		}
  3567→
  3568→		// We have the stream assigned and a leader, so only the stream leader should answer.
  3569→		if !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(stream) {
  3570→			return
  3571→		}
  3572→	}
  3573→
  3574→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3575→		if doErr {
  3576→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3577→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3578→		}
  3579→		return
  3580→	}
  3581→	if isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  3582→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  3583→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3584→		return
  3585→	}
  3586→	var req JSApiMsgGetRequest
  3587→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  3588→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  3589→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3590→		return
  3591→	}
  3592→
  3593→	// This version does not support batch.
  3594→	if req.Batch > 0 || req.MaxBytes > 0 {
  3595→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  3596→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3597→		return
  3598→	}
  3599→
  3600→	// Validate non-conflicting options. Seq, LastFor, and AsOfTime are mutually exclusive.
  3601→	// NextFor can be paired with Seq or AsOfTime indicating a filter subject.
  3602→	if (req.Seq > 0 && req.LastFor != _EMPTY_) ||
  3603→		(req.Seq == 0 && req.LastFor == _EMPTY_ && req.NextFor == _EMPTY_ && req.StartTime == nil) ||
  3604→		(req.Seq > 0 && req.StartTime != nil) ||
  3605→		(req.StartTime != nil && req.LastFor != _EMPTY_) ||
  3606→		(req.LastFor != _EMPTY_ && req.NextFor != _EMPTY_) {
  3607→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  3608→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3609→		return
  3610→	}
  3611→
  3612→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  3613→	if err != nil {
  3614→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  3615→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3616→		return
  3617→	}
  3618→	if mset.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  3619→		// Just let the request time out.
  3620→		return
  3621→	}
  3622→
  3623→	// Reject request if we can't guarantee the precondition of min last sequence.
  3624→	if req.MinLastSeq > 0 && mset.lastSeq() < req.MinLastSeq {
  3625→		// Even though only the leader is subscribed and will respond, we must delay the error.
  3626→		// An old leader could think it's still leader, and it must not
  3627→		// error sooner than the real leader can answer.
  3628→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMinLastSeqError()
  3629→		s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  3630→		return
  3631→	}
  3632→
  3633→	var svp StoreMsg
  3634→	var sm *StoreMsg
  3635→
  3636→	// If AsOfTime is set, perform this first to get the sequence.
  3637→	var seq uint64
  3638→	if req.StartTime != nil {
  3639→		seq = mset.store.GetSeqFromTime(*req.StartTime)
  3640→	} else {
  3641→		seq = req.Seq
  3642→	}
  3643→
  3644→	if seq > 0 && req.NextFor == _EMPTY_ {
  3645→		sm, err = mset.store.LoadMsg(seq, &svp)
  3646→	} else if req.NextFor != _EMPTY_ {
  3647→		sm, _, err = mset.store.LoadNextMsg(req.NextFor, subjectHasWildcard(req.NextFor), seq, &svp)
  3648→	} else {
  3649→		sm, err = mset.store.LoadLastMsg(req.LastFor, &svp)
  3650→	}
  3651→	if err != nil {
  3652→		resp.Error = NewJSNoMessageFoundError()
  3653→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3654→		return
  3655→	}
  3656→	resp.Message = &StoredMsg{
  3657→		Subject:  sm.subj,
  3658→		Sequence: sm.seq,
  3659→		Data:     sm.msg,
  3660→		Time:     time.Unix(0, sm.ts).UTC(),
  3661→	}
  3662→	if !req.NoHeaders {
  3663→		resp.Message.Header = sm.hdr
  3664→	}
  3665→
  3666→	// Don't send response through API layer for this call.
  3667→	s.sendInternalAccountMsg(nil, reply, s.jsonResponse(resp))
  3668→}

  3670→func (s *Server) jsConsumerUnpinRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3671→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3672→		return
  3673→	}
  3674→
  3675→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3676→	if err != nil {
  3677→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3678→		return
  3679→	}
  3680→
  3681→	stream := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  3682→	consumer := consumerNameFromSubject(subject)
  3683→
  3684→	var req JSApiConsumerUnpinRequest
  3685→	var resp = JSApiConsumerUnpinResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerUnpinResponseType}}
  3686→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3687→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3688→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3689→		return
  3690→	}
  3691→
  3692→	if err := json.Unmarshal(msg, &req); err != nil {
  3693→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  3694→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3695→		return
  3696→	}
  3697→
  3698→	if req.Group == _EMPTY_ {
  3699→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(errors.New("consumer group not specified"))
  3700→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3701→		return
  3702→	}
  3703→
  3704→	if !validGroupName.MatchString(req.Group) {
  3705→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerInvalidGroupNameError()
  3706→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3707→		return
  3708→	}
  3709→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3710→		// Check to make sure the stream is assigned.
  3711→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3712→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  3713→			return
  3714→		}
  3715→
  3716→		// First check if the stream and consumer is there.
  3717→		js.mu.RLock()
  3718→		sa := js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, stream)
  3719→		if sa == nil {
  3720→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  3721→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  3722→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3723→			return
  3724→		}
  3725→		if sa.unsupported != nil {
  3726→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  3727→			// Just let the request time out.
  3728→			return
  3729→		}
  3730→
  3731→		ca, ok := sa.consumers[consumer]
  3732→		if !ok || ca == nil {
  3733→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  3734→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  3735→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3736→			return
  3737→		}
  3738→		if ca.unsupported != nil {
  3739→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  3740→			// Just let the request time out.
  3741→			return
  3742→		}
  3743→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  3744→
  3745→		// Then check if we are the leader.
  3746→		mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  3747→		if err != nil {
  3748→			return
  3749→		}
  3750→
  3751→		o := mset.lookupConsumer(consumer)
  3752→		if o == nil {
  3753→			return
  3754→		}
  3755→		if !o.isLeader() {
  3756→			return
  3757→		}
  3758→	}
  3759→
  3760→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3761→		if doErr {
  3762→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3763→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3764→		}
  3765→		return
  3766→	}
  3767→
  3768→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  3769→	if err != nil {
  3770→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  3771→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3772→		return
  3773→	}
  3774→	if mset.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  3775→		// Just let the request time out.
  3776→		return
  3777→	}
  3778→	o := mset.lookupConsumer(consumer)
  3779→	if o == nil {
  3780→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  3781→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3782→		return
  3783→	}
  3784→	if o.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  3785→		// Just let the request time out.
  3786→		return
  3787→	}
  3788→
  3789→	var foundPriority bool
  3790→	for _, group := range o.config().PriorityGroups {
  3791→		if group == req.Group {
  3792→			foundPriority = true
  3793→			break
  3794→		}
  3795→	}
  3796→	if !foundPriority {
  3797→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerInvalidPriorityGroupError()
  3798→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3799→		return
  3800→	}
  3801→
  3802→	o.mu.Lock()
  3803→	o.currentPinId = _EMPTY_
  3804→	o.sendUnpinnedAdvisoryLocked(req.Group, "admin")
  3805→	o.mu.Unlock()
  3806→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  3807→}

  3809→// Request to purge a stream.

  3813→	}
  3814→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)

  3823→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
