  3828→
  3829→	// If we are in clustered mode we need to be the stream leader to proceed.
  3830→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3831→		// Check to make sure the stream is assigned.
  3832→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  3833→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  3834→			return
  3835→		}
  3836→
  3837→		js.mu.RLock()
  3838→		isLeader, sa := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, stream)
  3839→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  3840→
  3841→		if isLeader && sa == nil {
  3842→			// We can't find the stream, so mimic what would be the errors below.
  3843→			if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3844→				if doErr {
  3845→					resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3846→					s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3847→				}
  3848→				return
  3849→			}
  3850→			// No stream present.
  3851→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  3852→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3853→			return
  3854→		} else if sa == nil {
  3855→			if js.isLeaderless() {
  3856→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3857→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3858→			}
  3859→			return
  3860→		}
  3861→
  3862→		// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  3863→		if js.isGroupLeaderless(sa.Group) {
  3864→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3865→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3866→			return
  3867→		}
  3868→
  3869→		// We have the stream assigned and a leader, so only the stream leader should answer.
  3870→		if !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(stream) {
  3871→			if js.isLeaderless() {
  3872→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  3873→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3874→			}
  3875→			return
  3876→		}
  3877→	}
  3878→
  3879→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  3880→		if doErr {
  3881→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3882→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3883→		}
  3884→		return
  3885→	}
  3886→
  3887→	var purgeRequest *JSApiStreamPurgeRequest
  3888→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  3889→		var req JSApiStreamPurgeRequest
  3890→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  3891→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  3892→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3893→			return
  3894→		}
  3895→		if req.Sequence > 0 && req.Keep > 0 {
  3896→			resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  3897→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3898→			return
  3899→		}
  3900→		purgeRequest = &req
  3901→	}
  3902→
  3903→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  3904→	if err != nil {
  3905→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  3906→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3907→		return
  3908→	}
  3909→	if mset.cfg.Sealed {
  3910→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamSealedError()
  3911→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3912→		return
  3913→	}
  3914→	if mset.cfg.DenyPurge {
  3915→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamPurgeFailedError(errors.New("stream purge not permitted"))
  3916→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3917→		return
  3918→	}
  3919→
  3920→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  3921→		s.jsClusteredStreamPurgeRequest(ci, acc, mset, stream, subject, reply, rmsg, purgeRequest)
  3922→		return
  3923→	}
  3924→
  3925→	purged, err := mset.purge(purgeRequest)
  3926→	if err != nil {
  3927→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamGeneralError(err, Unless(err))
  3928→	} else {
  3929→		resp.Purged = purged
  3930→		resp.Success = true
  3931→	}
  3932→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  3933→}
  3934→
  3935→func (acc *Account) jsNonClusteredStreamLimitsCheck(cfg *StreamConfig) *ApiError {
  3936→	var replicas int
  3937→	if cfg != nil {
  3938→		replicas = cfg.Replicas
  3939→	}
  3940→	selectedLimits, tier, jsa, apiErr := acc.selectLimits(replicas)
  3941→	if apiErr != nil {
  3942→		return apiErr
  3943→	}
  3944→	jsa.mu.RLock()
  3945→	defer jsa.mu.RUnlock()
  3946→	if selectedLimits.MaxStreams > 0 && jsa.countStreams(tier, cfg) >= selectedLimits.MaxStreams {
  3947→		return NewJSMaximumStreamsLimitError()
  3948→	}
  3949→	reserved := jsa.tieredReservation(tier, cfg)
  3950→	if err := jsa.js.checkAllLimits(selectedLimits, cfg, reserved, 0); err != nil {
  3951→		return NewJSStreamLimitsError(err, Unless(err))
  3952→	}
  3953→	return nil
  3954→}
  3955→
  3956→// Request to restore a stream.
  3957→func (s *Server) jsStreamRestoreRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  3958→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  3959→		return
  3960→	}
  3961→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  3962→	if err != nil {
  3963→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  3964→		return
  3965→	}
  3966→
  3967→	var resp = JSApiStreamRestoreResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamRestoreResponseType}}
  3968→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  3969→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  3970→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3971→		return
  3972→	}
  3973→	if !acc.JetStreamEnabled() {
  3974→		resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  3975→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3976→		return
  3977→	}
  3978→	if isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  3979→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  3980→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3981→		return
  3982→	}
  3983→
  3984→	var req JSApiStreamRestoreRequest
  3985→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  3986→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  3987→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  3988→		return
  3989→	}
  3990→
  3991→	stream := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  3992→
  3993→	if stream != req.Config.Name && req.Config.Name == _EMPTY_ {
  3994→		req.Config.Name = stream
  3995→	}
  3996→
  3997→	// check stream config at the start of the restore process, not at the end
  3998→	cfg, apiErr := s.checkStreamCfg(&req.Config, acc, false)
  3999→	if apiErr != nil {
  4000→		resp.Error = apiErr
  4001→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4002→		return
  4003→	}
  4004→
  4005→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  4006→		s.jsClusteredStreamRestoreRequest(ci, acc, &req, subject, reply, rmsg)
  4007→		return
  4008→	}
  4009→
  4010→	if err := acc.jsNonClusteredStreamLimitsCheck(&cfg); err != nil {
  4011→		resp.Error = err
  4012→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4013→		return
  4014→	}
  4015→
  4016→	if _, err := acc.lookupStream(stream); err == nil {
  4017→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNameExistRestoreFailedError()
  4018→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4019→		return
  4020→	}
  4021→
  4022→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  4023→		if doErr {
  4024→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  4025→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4026→		}
  4027→		return
  4028→	}
  4029→
  4030→	s.processStreamRestore(ci, acc, &req.Config, subject, reply, string(msg))
  4031→}
  4032→
  4033→func (s *Server) processStreamRestore(ci *ClientInfo, acc *Account, cfg *StreamConfig, subject, reply, msg string) <-chan error {
  4034→	js := s.getJetStream()
  4035→
  4036→	var resp = JSApiStreamRestoreResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamRestoreResponseType}}
  4037→
  4038→	snapDir := filepath.Join(js.config.StoreDir, snapStagingDir)
  4039→	if _, err := os.Stat(snapDir); os.IsNotExist(err) {
  4040→		if err := os.MkdirAll(snapDir, defaultDirPerms); err != nil {
  4041→			resp.Error = &ApiError{Code: 503, Description: "JetStream unable to create temp storage for restore"}
  4042→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4043→			return nil
  4044→		}
  4045→	}
  4046→
  4047→	tfile, err := os.CreateTemp(snapDir, "js-restore-")
  4048→	if err != nil {
  4049→		resp.Error = NewJSTempStorageFailedError()
  4050→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, msg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4051→		return nil
  4052→	}
  4053→
  4054→	streamName := cfg.Name
  4055→	s.Noticef("Starting restore for stream '%s > %s'", acc.Name, streamName)
  4056→
  4057→	start := time.Now().UTC()
  4058→	domain := s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain
  4059→	s.publishAdvisory(acc, JSAdvisoryStreamRestoreCreatePre+"."+streamName, &JSRestoreCreateAdvisory{
  4060→		TypedEvent: TypedEvent{
  4061→			Type: JSRestoreCreateAdvisoryType,
  4062→			ID:   nuid.Next(),
  4063→			Time: start,
  4064→		},
  4065→		Stream: streamName,
  4066→		Client: ci.forAdvisory(),
  4067→		Domain: domain,
  4068→	})
  4069→
  4070→	// Create our internal subscription to accept the snapshot.
  4071→	restoreSubj := fmt.Sprintf(jsRestoreDeliverT, streamName, nuid.Next())
  4072→
  4073→	type result struct {
  4074→		err   error
  4075→		reply string
  4076→	}
  4077→
  4078→	// For signaling to upper layers.
  4079→	resultCh := make(chan result, 1)
  4080→	activeQ := newIPQueue[int](s, fmt.Sprintf("[ACC:%s] stream '%s' restore", acc.Name, streamName)) // of int
  4081→
  4082→	var total int
  4083→
  4084→	// FIXME(dlc) - Probably take out of network path eventually due to disk I/O?
  4085→	processChunk := func(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, msg []byte) {
  4086→		// We require reply subjects to communicate back failures, flow etc. If they do not have one log and cancel.
  4087→		if reply == _EMPTY_ {
  4088→			sub.client.processUnsub(sub.sid)
  4089→			resultCh <- result{
  4090→				fmt.Errorf("restore for stream '%s > %s' requires reply subject for each chunk", acc.Name, streamName),
  4091→				reply,
  4092→			}
  4093→			return
  4094→		}
  4095→		// Account client messages have \r\n on end. This is an error.
  4096→		if len(msg) < LEN_CR_LF {
  4097→			sub.client.processUnsub(sub.sid)
  4098→			resultCh <- result{
  4099→				fmt.Errorf("restore for stream '%s > %s' received short chunk", acc.Name, streamName),
  4100→				reply,
  4101→			}
  4102→			return
  4103→		}
  4104→		// Adjust.
  4105→		msg = msg[:len(msg)-LEN_CR_LF]
  4106→
  4107→		// This means we are complete with our transfer from the client.
  4108→		if len(msg) == 0 {
  4109→			s.Debugf("Finished staging restore for stream '%s > %s'", acc.Name, streamName)
  4110→			resultCh <- result{err, reply}
  4111→			return
  4112→		}
  4113→
  4114→		// We track total and check on server limits.
  4115→		// TODO(dlc) - We could check apriori and cancel initial request if we know it won't fit.
  4116→		total += len(msg)
  4117→		if js.wouldExceedLimits(FileStorage, total) {
  4118→			s.resourcesExceededError(FileStorage)
  4119→			resultCh <- result{NewJSInsufficientResourcesError(), reply}
  4120→			return
  4121→		}
  4122→
  4123→		// Append chunk to temp file. Mark as issue if we encounter an error.
  4124→		if n, err := tfile.Write(msg); n != len(msg) || err != nil {
  4125→			resultCh <- result{err, reply}
  4126→			if reply != _EMPTY_ {
  4127→				s.sendInternalAccountMsg(acc, reply, "-ERR 'storage failure during restore'")
  4128→			}
  4129→			return
  4130→		}
  4131→
  4132→		activeQ.push(len(msg))
  4133→
  4134→		s.sendInternalAccountMsg(acc, reply, nil)
  4135→	}
  4136→
  4137→	sub, err := acc.subscribeInternal(restoreSubj, processChunk)
  4138→	if err != nil {
  4139→		tfile.Close()
  4140→		os.Remove(tfile.Name())
  4141→		resp.Error = NewJSRestoreSubscribeFailedError(err, restoreSubj)
  4142→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, msg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4143→		return nil
  4144→	}
  4145→
  4146→	// Mark the subject so the end user knows where to send the snapshot chunks.
  4147→	resp.DeliverSubject = restoreSubj
  4148→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, msg, s.jsonResponse(resp))
  4149→
  4150→	doneCh := make(chan error, 1)
  4151→
  4152→	// Monitor the progress from another Go routine.
  4153→	s.startGoRoutine(func() {
  4154→		defer s.grWG.Done()
  4155→		defer func() {
  4156→			tfile.Close()
  4157→			os.Remove(tfile.Name())
  4158→			sub.client.processUnsub(sub.sid)
  4159→			activeQ.unregister()
  4160→		}()
  4161→
  4162→		const activityInterval = 5 * time.Second
  4163→		notActive := time.NewTimer(activityInterval)
  4164→		defer notActive.Stop()
  4165→
  4166→		total := 0
  4167→		for {
  4168→			select {
  4169→			case result := <-resultCh:
  4170→				err := result.err
  4171→				var mset *stream
  4172→
  4173→				// If we staged properly go ahead and do restore now.
  4174→				if err == nil {
  4175→					s.Debugf("Finalizing restore for stream '%s > %s'", acc.Name, streamName)
  4176→					tfile.Seek(0, 0)
  4177→					mset, err = acc.RestoreStream(cfg, tfile)
  4178→				} else {
  4179→					errStr := err.Error()
  4180→					tmp := []rune(errStr)
  4181→					tmp[0] = unicode.ToUpper(tmp[0])
  4182→					s.Warnf(errStr)
  4183→				}
  4184→
  4185→				end := time.Now().UTC()
  4186→
  4187→				// TODO(rip) - Should this have the error code in it??
  4188→				s.publishAdvisory(acc, JSAdvisoryStreamRestoreCompletePre+"."+streamName, &JSRestoreCompleteAdvisory{
  4189→					TypedEvent: TypedEvent{
  4190→						Type: JSRestoreCompleteAdvisoryType,
  4191→						ID:   nuid.Next(),
  4192→						Time: end,
  4193→					},
  4194→					Stream: streamName,
  4195→					Start:  start,
  4196→					End:    end,
  4197→					Bytes:  int64(total),
  4198→					Client: ci.forAdvisory(),
  4199→					Domain: domain,
  4200→				})
  4201→
  4202→				var resp = JSApiStreamCreateResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamCreateResponseType}}
  4203→
  4204→				if err != nil {
  4205→					resp.Error = NewJSStreamRestoreError(err, Unless(err))
  4206→					s.Warnf("Restore failed for %s for stream '%s > %s' in %v",
  4207→						friendlyBytes(int64(total)), acc.Name, streamName, end.Sub(start))
  4208→				} else {
  4209→					msetCfg := mset.config()
  4210→					resp.StreamInfo = &StreamInfo{
  4211→						Created:   mset.createdTime(),
  4212→						State:     mset.state(),
  4213→						Config:    *setDynamicStreamMetadata(&msetCfg),
  4214→						TimeStamp: time.Now().UTC(),
  4215					}
  4216→					s.Noticef("Completed restore of %s for stream '%s > %s' in %v",
  4217→						friendlyBytes(int64(total)), acc.Name, streamName, end.Sub(start).Round(time.Millisecond))
  4218→				}
  4219→
  4220→				// On the last EOF, send back the stream info or error status.
  4221→				s.sendInternalAccountMsg(acc, result.reply, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4222→				// Signal to the upper layers.
  4223→				doneCh <- err
  4224→				return
  4225→			case <-activeQ.ch:
  4226→				if n, ok := activeQ.popOne(); ok {
  4227→					total += n
  4228→					notActive.Reset(activityInterval)
  4229→				}
  4230→			case <-notActive.C:
  4231→				err := fmt.Errorf("restore for stream '%s > %s' is stalled", acc, streamName)
  4232→				doneCh <- err
  4233→				return
  4234→			}
  4235→		}
  4236→	})
  4237→
  4238→	return doneCh
  4239→}
  4240→
  4241→// Process a snapshot request.
  4242→func (s *Server) jsStreamSnapshotRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  4243→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  4244→		return
  4245→	}
  4246→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  4247→	if err != nil {
  4248→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  4249→		return
  4250→	}
  4251→
  4252→	smsg := string(msg)
  4253→	stream := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  4254→
  4255→	// If we are in clustered mode we need to be the stream leader to proceed.
  4256→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() && !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(stream) {
  4257→		return
  4258→	}
  4259→
  4260→	var resp = JSApiStreamSnapshotResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiStreamSnapshotResponseType}}
  4261→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  4262→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  4263→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4264→		return
  4265→	}
  4266→	if !acc.JetStreamEnabled() {
  4267→		resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  4268→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4269→		return
  4270→	}
  4271→	if isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  4272→		resp.Error = NewJSBadRequestError()
  4273→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4274→		return
  4275→	}
  4276→
  4277→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  4278→	if err != nil {
  4279→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  4280→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4281→		return
  4282→	}
  4283→
  4284→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  4285→		if doErr {
  4286→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  4287→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4288→		}
  4289→		return
  4290→	}
  4291→
  4292→	var req JSApiStreamSnapshotRequest
  4293→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  4294→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  4295→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4296→		return
  4297→	}
  4298→	if !IsValidSubject(req.DeliverSubject) {
  4299→		resp.Error = NewJSSnapshotDeliverSubjectInvalidError()
  4300→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4301→		return
  4302→	}
  4303→
  4304→	// We will do the snapshot in a go routine as well since check msgs may
  4305→	// stall this go routine.
  4306→	go func() {
  4307→		if req.CheckMsgs {
  4308→			s.Noticef("Starting health check and snapshot for stream '%s > %s'", mset.jsa.account.Name, mset.name())
  4309→		} else {
  4310→			s.Noticef("Starting snapshot for stream '%s > %s'", mset.jsa.account.Name, mset.name())
  4311→		}
  4312→
  4313→		start := time.Now().UTC()
  4314→
  4315→		sr, err := mset.snapshot(0, req.CheckMsgs, !req.NoConsumers)
  4316→		if err != nil {
  4317→			s.Warnf("Snapshot of stream '%s > %s' failed: %v", mset.jsa.account.Name, mset.name(), err)
  4318→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamSnapshotError(err, Unless(err))
  4319→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4320→			return
  4321→		}
  4322→
  4323→		config := mset.config()
  4324→		resp.State = &sr.State
  4325→		resp.Config = &config
  4326→
  4327→		s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, smsg, s.jsonResponse(resp))
  4328→
  4329→		s.publishAdvisory(acc, JSAdvisoryStreamSnapshotCreatePre+"."+mset.name(), &JSSnapshotCreateAdvisory{
  4330→			TypedEvent: TypedEvent{
  4331→				Type: JSSnapshotCreatedAdvisoryType,
  4332→				ID:   nuid.Next(),
  4333→				Time: time.Now().UTC(),
  4334→			},
  4335→			Stream: mset.name(),
  4336→			State:  sr.State,
  4337→			Client: ci.forAdvisory(),
  4338→			Domain: s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain,
  4339→		})
  4340→
  4341→		// Now do the real streaming.
  4342→		s.streamSnapshot(acc, mset, sr, &req)
  4343→
  4344→		end := time.Now().UTC()
  4345→
  4346→		s.publishAdvisory(acc, JSAdvisoryStreamSnapshotCompletePre+"."+mset.name(), &JSSnapshotCompleteAdvisory{
  4347→			TypedEvent: TypedEvent{
  4348→				Type: JSSnapshotCompleteAdvisoryType,
  4349→				ID:   nuid.Next(),
  4350→				Time: end,
  4351→			},
  4352→			Stream: mset.name(),
  4353→			Start:  start,
  4354→			End:    end,
  4355→			Client: ci.forAdvisory(),
  4356→			Domain: s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain,
  4357→		})
  4358→
  4359→		s.Noticef("Completed snapshot of %s for stream '%s > %s' in %v",
  4360→			friendlyBytes(int64(sr.State.Bytes)),
  4361→			mset.jsa.account.Name,
  4362→			mset.name(),
  4363→			end.Sub(start))
  4364→	}()
  4365→}
  4366→
  4367→// Default chunk size for now.
  4368→const defaultSnapshotChunkSize = 128 * 1024
  4369→const defaultSnapshotWindowSize = 8 * 1024 * 1024 // 8MB
  4370→
  4371→// streamSnapshot will stream out our snapshot to the reply subject.
  4372→func (s *Server) streamSnapshot(acc *Account, mset *stream, sr *SnapshotResult, req *JSApiStreamSnapshotRequest) {
  4373→	chunkSize := req.ChunkSize
  4374→	if chunkSize == 0 {
  4375→		chunkSize = defaultSnapshotChunkSize
  4376→	}
  4377→	// Setup for the chunk stream.
  4378→	reply := req.DeliverSubject
  4379→	r := sr.Reader
  4380→	defer r.Close()
  4381→
  4382→	// Check interest for the snapshot deliver subject.
  4383→	inch := make(chan bool, 1)
  4384→	acc.sl.RegisterNotification(req.DeliverSubject, inch)
  4385→	defer acc.sl.ClearNotification(req.DeliverSubject, inch)
  4386→	hasInterest := <-inch
  4387→	if !hasInterest {
  4388→		// Allow 2 seconds or so for interest to show up.
  4389→		select {
  4390→		case <-inch:
  4391→		case <-time.After(2 * time.Second):
  4392→		}
  4393→	}
  4394→
  4395→	// Create our ack flow handler.
  4396→	// This is very simple for now.
  4397→	ackSize := defaultSnapshotWindowSize / chunkSize
  4398→	if ackSize < 8 {
  4399→		ackSize = 8
  4400→	} else if ackSize > 8*1024 {
  4401→		ackSize = 8 * 1024
  4402→	}
  4403→	acks := make(chan struct{}, ackSize)
  4404→	acks <- struct{}{}
  4405→
  4406→	// Track bytes outstanding.
  4407→	var out int32
  4408→
  4409→	// We will place sequence number and size of chunk sent in the reply.
  4410→	ackSubj := fmt.Sprintf(jsSnapshotAckT, mset.name(), nuid.Next())
  4411→	ackSub, _ := mset.subscribeInternal(ackSubj+".>", func(_ *subscription, _ *client, _ *Account, subject, _ string, _ []byte) {
  4412→		cs, _ := strconv.Atoi(tokenAt(subject, 6))
  4413→		// This is very crude and simple, but ok for now.
  4414→		// This only matters when sending multiple chunks.
  4415→		if atomic.AddInt32(&out, int32(-cs)) < defaultSnapshotWindowSize {
  4416→			select {
  4417→			case acks <- struct{}{}:
  4418→			default:
  4419→			}
  4420→		}
  4421→	})
  4422→	defer mset.unsubscribe(ackSub)
  4423→
  4424→	// TODO(dlc) - Add in NATS-Chunked-Sequence header
  4425→	var hdr []byte
  4426→	for index := 1; ; index++ {
  4427→		chunk := make([]byte, chunkSize)
  4428→		n, err := r.Read(chunk)
  4429→		chunk = chunk[:n]
  4430→		if err != nil {
  4431→			if n > 0 {
  4432→				mset.outq.send(newJSPubMsg(reply, _EMPTY_, _EMPTY_, nil, chunk, nil, 0))
  4433→			}
  4434→			break
  4435→		}
  4436→
  4437→		// Wait on acks for flow control if past our window size.
  4438→		// Wait up to 10ms for now if no acks received.
  4439→		if atomic.LoadInt32(&out) > defaultSnapshotWindowSize {
  4440→			select {
  4441→			case <-acks:
  4442→				// ok to proceed.
  4443→			case <-inch:
  4444→				// Lost interest
  4445→				hdr = []byte("NATS/1.0 408 No Interest\r\n\r\n")
  4446→				goto done
  4447→			case <-time.After(2 * time.Second):
  4448→				hdr = []byte("NATS/1.0 408 No Flow Response\r\n\r\n")
  4449→				goto done
  4450→			}
  4451→		}
  4452→		ackReply := fmt.Sprintf("%s.%d.%d", ackSubj, len(chunk), index)
  4453→		if hdr == nil {
  4454→			hdr = []byte("NATS/1.0 204\r\n\r\n")
  4455→		}
  4456→		mset.outq.send(newJSPubMsg(reply, _EMPTY_, ackReply, nil, chunk, nil, 0))
  4457→		atomic.AddInt32(&out, int32(len(chunk)))
  4458→	}
  4459→
  4460→	if err := <-sr.errCh; err != _EMPTY_ {
  4461→		hdr = []byte(fmt.Sprintf("NATS/1.0 500 %s\r\n\r\n", err))
  4462→	}
  4463→
  4464→done:
  4465→	// Send last EOF
  4466→	// TODO(dlc) - place hash in header
  4467→	mset.outq.send(newJSPubMsg(reply, _EMPTY_, _EMPTY_, hdr, nil, nil, 0))
  4468→}
  4469→
  4470→// For determining consumer request type.
  4471→type ccReqType uint8
  4472→
  4473→const (
  4474→	ccNew = iota
  4475→	ccLegacyEphemeral
  4476→	ccLegacyDurable
  4477→)
  4478→
  4479→// Request to create a consumer where stream and optional consumer name are part of the subject, and optional
  4480→// filtered subjects can be at the tail end.
  4481→// Assumes stream and consumer names are single tokens.
  4482→func (s *Server) jsConsumerCreateRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, a *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  4483→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  4484→		return
  4485→	}
  4486→
  4487→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  4488→	if err != nil {
  4489→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  4490→		return
  4491→	}
  4492→
  4493→	var resp = JSApiConsumerCreateResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerCreateResponseType}}
  4494→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  4495→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  4496→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4497→		return
  4498→	}
  4499→
  4500→	var req CreateConsumerRequest
  4501→	if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  4502→		resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  4503→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4504→		return
  4505→	}
  4506→
  4507→	var js *jetStream
  4508→	isClustered := s.JetStreamIsClustered()
  4509→
  4510→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  4511→	if isClustered {
  4512→		if req.Config.Direct {
  4513→			// Check to see if we have this stream and are the stream leader.
  4514→			if !acc.JetStreamIsStreamLeader(streamNameFromSubject(subject)) {
  4515→				return
  4516→			}
  4517→		} else {
  4518→			var cc *jetStreamCluster
  4519→			js, cc = s.getJetStreamCluster()
  4520→			if js == nil || cc == nil {
  4521→				return
  4522→			}
  4523→			if js.isLeaderless() {
  4524→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  4525→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4526→				return
  4527→			}
  4528→			// Make sure we are meta leader.
  4529→			if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  4530→				return
  4531→			}
  4532→		}
  4533→	}
  4534→
  4535→	var streamName, consumerName, filteredSubject string
  4536→	var rt ccReqType
  4537→
  4538→	if n := numTokens(subject); n < 5 {
  4539→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  4540→		return
  4541→	} else if n == 5 {
  4542→		// Legacy ephemeral.
  4543→		rt = ccLegacyEphemeral
  4544→		streamName = streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  4545→	} else {
  4546→		// New style and durable legacy.
  4547→		if tokenAt(subject, 4) == "DURABLE" {
  4548→			rt = ccLegacyDurable
  4549→			if n != 7 {
  4550→				resp.Error = NewJSConsumerDurableNameNotInSubjectError()
  4551→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4552→				return
  4553→			}
  4554→			streamName = tokenAt(subject, 6)
  4555→			consumerName = tokenAt(subject, 7)
  4556→		} else {
  4557→			streamName = streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  4558→			consumerName = consumerNameFromSubject(subject)
  4559→			// New has optional filtered subject as part of main subject..
  4560→			if n > 6 {
  4561→				tokens := strings.Split(subject, tsep)
  4562→				filteredSubject = strings.Join(tokens[6:], tsep)
  4563→			}
  4564→		}
  4565→	}
  4566→
  4567→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  4568→		if doErr {
  4569→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  4570→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4571→		}
  4572→		return
  4573→	}
  4574→
  4575→	if streamName != req.Stream {
  4576→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamMismatchError()
  4577→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4578→		return
  4579→	}
  4580→
  4581→	if consumerName != _EMPTY_ {
  4582→		// Check for path like separators in the name.
  4583→		if strings.ContainsAny(consumerName, `\/`) {
  4584→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNameContainsPathSeparatorsError()
  4585→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4586→			return
  4587→		}
  4588→	}
  4589→
  4590→	// Should we expect a durable name
  4591→	if rt == ccLegacyDurable {
  4592→		if numTokens(subject) < 7 {
  4593→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerDurableNameNotInSubjectError()
  4594→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4595→			return
  4596→		}
  4597→		// Now check on requirements for durable request.
  4598→		if req.Config.Durable == _EMPTY_ {
  4599→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerDurableNameNotSetError()
  4600→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4601→			return
  4602→		}
  4603→		if consumerName != req.Config.Durable {
  4604→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerDurableNameNotMatchSubjectError()
  4605→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4606→			return
  4607→		}
  4608→	}
  4609→	// If new style and durable set make sure they match.
  4610→	if rt == ccNew {
  4611→		if req.Config.Durable != _EMPTY_ {
  4612→			if consumerName != req.Config.Durable {
  4613→				resp.Error = NewJSConsumerDurableNameNotMatchSubjectError()
  4614→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4615→				return
  4616→			}
  4617→		}
  4618→		// New style ephemeral so we need to honor the name.
  4619→		req.Config.Name = consumerName
  4620→	}
  4621→	// Check for legacy ephemeral mis-configuration.
  4622→	if rt == ccLegacyEphemeral && req.Config.Durable != _EMPTY_ {
  4623→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerEphemeralWithDurableNameError()
  4624→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4625→		return
  4626→	}
  4627→
  4628→	// in case of multiple filters provided, error if new API is used.
  4629→	if filteredSubject != _EMPTY_ && len(req.Config.FilterSubjects) != 0 {
  4630→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerMultipleFiltersNotAllowedError()
  4631→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4632→		return
  4633→	}
  4634→
  4635→	// Check for a filter subject.
  4636→	if filteredSubject != _EMPTY_ && req.Config.FilterSubject != filteredSubject {
  4637→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerCreateFilterSubjectMismatchError()
  4638→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4639→		return
  4640→	}
  4641→
  4642→	if isClustered && !req.Config.Direct {
  4643→		s.jsClusteredConsumerRequest(ci, acc, subject, reply, rmsg, req.Stream, &req.Config, req.Action, req.Pedantic)
  4644→		return
  4645→	}
  4646→
  4647→	// If we are here we are single server mode.
  4648→	if req.Config.Replicas > 1 {
  4649→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamReplicasNotSupportedError()
  4650→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4651→		return
  4652→	}
  4653→
  4654→	stream, err := acc.lookupStream(req.Stream)
  4655→	if err != nil {
  4656→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  4657→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4658→		return
  4659→	}
  4660→	if stream.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  4661→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamOfflineReasonError(errors.New(stream.offlineReason))
  4662→		s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  4663→		return
  4664→	}
  4665→
  4666→	if o := stream.lookupConsumer(consumerName); o != nil {
  4667→		if o.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  4668→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerOfflineReasonError(errors.New(o.offlineReason))
  4669→			s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  4670→			return
  4671→		}
  4672→		// If the consumer already exists then don't allow updating the PauseUntil, just set
  4673→		// it back to whatever the current configured value is.
  4674→		o.mu.RLock()
  4675→		req.Config.PauseUntil = o.cfg.PauseUntil
  4676→		o.mu.RUnlock()
  4677→	}
  4678→
  4679→	// Initialize/update asset version metadata.
  4680→	setStaticConsumerMetadata(&req.Config)
  4681→
  4682→	o, err := stream.addConsumerWithAction(&req.Config, req.Action, req.Pedantic)
  4683→
  4684→	if err != nil {
  4685→		if IsNatsErr(err, JSConsumerStoreFailedErrF) {
  4686→			cname := req.Config.Durable // Will be empty if ephemeral.
  4687→			s.Warnf("Consumer create failed for '%s > %s > %s': %v", acc, req.Stream, cname, err)
  4688→			err = errConsumerStoreFailed
  4689→		}
  4690→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerCreateError(err, Unless(err))
  4691→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4692→		return
  4693→	}
  4694→	resp.ConsumerInfo = setDynamicConsumerInfoMetadata(o.initialInfo())
  4695→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  4696→
  4697→	o.mu.RLock()
  4698→	if o.cfg.PauseUntil != nil && !o.cfg.PauseUntil.IsZero() && time.Now().Before(*o.cfg.PauseUntil) {
  4699→		o.sendPauseAdvisoryLocked(&o.cfg)
  4700→	}
  4701→	o.mu.RUnlock()
  4702→}
  4703→
  4704→// Request for the list of all consumer names.
  4705→func (s *Server) jsConsumerNamesRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  4706→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  4707→		return
  4708→	}
  4709→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  4710→	if err != nil {
  4711→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  4712→		return
  4713→	}
  4714→
  4715→	var resp = JSApiConsumerNamesResponse{
  4716→		ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerNamesResponseType},
  4717→		Consumers:   []string{},
  4718→	}
  4719→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  4720→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  4721→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4722→		return
  4723→	}
  4724→
  4725→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  4726→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  4727→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  4728→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  4729→			return
  4730→		}
  4731→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  4732→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  4733→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4734→			return
  4735→		}
  4736→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  4737→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  4738→			return
  4739→		}
  4740→	}
  4741→
  4742→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  4743→		if doErr {
  4744→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  4745→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4746→		}
  4747→		return
  4748→	}
  4749→
  4750→	var offset int
  4751→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  4752→		var req JSApiConsumersRequest
  4753→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  4754→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  4755→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4756→			return
  4757→		}
  4758→		offset = req.Offset
  4759→	}
  4760→
  4761→	streamName := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  4762→	var numConsumers int
  4763→
  4764→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  4765→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  4766→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  4767→			// TODO(dlc) - Debug or Warn?
  4768→			return
  4769→		}
  4770→		js.mu.RLock()
  4771→		sas := cc.streams[acc.Name]
  4772→		if sas == nil {
  4773→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  4774→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  4775→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4776→			return
  4777→		}
  4778→		sa := sas[streamName]
  4779→		if sa == nil || sa.err != nil {
  4780→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  4781→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  4782→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4783→			return
  4784→		}
  4785→		for consumer := range sa.consumers {
  4786→			resp.Consumers = append(resp.Consumers, consumer)
  4787→		}
  4788→		if len(resp.Consumers) > 1 {
  4789→			slices.Sort(resp.Consumers)
  4790→		}
  4791→		numConsumers = len(resp.Consumers)
  4792→		if offset > numConsumers {
  4793→			offset = numConsumers
  4794→		}
  4795→		resp.Consumers = resp.Consumers[offset:]
  4796→		if len(resp.Consumers) > JSApiNamesLimit {
  4797→			resp.Consumers = resp.Consumers[:JSApiNamesLimit]
  4798→		}
  4799→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  4800→
  4801→	} else {
  4802→		mset, err := acc.lookupStream(streamName)
  4803→		if err != nil {
  4804→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  4805→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4806→			return
  4807→		}
  4808→
  4809→		obs := mset.getPublicConsumers()
  4810→		slices.SortFunc(obs, func(i, j *consumer) int { return cmp.Compare(i.name, j.name) })
  4811→
  4812→		numConsumers = len(obs)
  4813→		if offset > numConsumers {
  4814→			offset = numConsumers
  4815→		}
  4816→
  4817→		for _, o := range obs[offset:] {
  4818→			resp.Consumers = append(resp.Consumers, o.String())
  4819→			if len(resp.Consumers) >= JSApiNamesLimit {
  4820→				break
  4821→			}
  4822→		}
  4823→	}
  4824→	resp.Total = numConsumers
  4825→	resp.Limit = JSApiNamesLimit
  4826→	resp.Offset = offset
  4827→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  4828→}
  4829→
  4830→// Request for the list of all detailed consumer information.
  4831→func (s *Server) jsConsumerListRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  4832→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  4833→		return
  4834→	}
  4835→
  4836→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  4837→	if err != nil {
  4838→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  4839→		return
  4840→	}
  4841→
  4842→	var resp = JSApiConsumerListResponse{
  4843→		ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerListResponseType},
  4844→		Consumers:   []*ConsumerInfo{},
  4845→	}
  4846→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  4847→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  4848→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4849→		return
  4850→	}
  4851→
  4852→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  4853→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  4854→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  4855→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  4856→			return
  4857→		}
  4858→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  4859→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  4860→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4861→			return
  4862→		}
  4863→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  4864→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  4865→			return
  4866→		}
  4867→	}
  4868→
  4869→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  4870→		resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  4871→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4872→		return
  4873→	}
  4874→
  4875→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  4876→		if doErr {
  4877→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  4878→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4879→		}
  4880→		return
  4881→	}
  4882→
  4883→	var offset int
  4884→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  4885→		var req JSApiConsumersRequest
  4886→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  4887→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  4888→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4889→			return
  4890→		}
  4891→		offset = req.Offset
  4892→	}
  4893→
  4894→	streamName := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  4895→
  4896→	// Clustered mode will invoke a scatter and gather.
  4897→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  4898→		// Need to copy these off before sending.. don't move this inside startGoRoutine!!!
  4899→		msg = copyBytes(msg)
  4900→		s.startGoRoutine(func() {
  4901→			s.jsClusteredConsumerListRequest(acc, ci, offset, streamName, subject, reply, msg)
  4902→		})
  4903→		return
  4904→	}
  4905→
  4906→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(streamName)
  4907→	if err != nil {
  4908→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  4909→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4910→		return
  4911→	}
  4912→
  4913→	obs := mset.getPublicConsumers()
  4914→	slices.SortFunc(obs, func(i, j *consumer) int { return cmp.Compare(i.name, j.name) })
  4915→
  4916→	ocnt := len(obs)
  4917→	if offset > ocnt {
  4918→		offset = ocnt
  4919→	}
  4920→
  4921→	var missingNames []string
  4922→	for _, o := range obs[offset:] {
  4923→		if o.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  4924→			if resp.Offline == nil {
  4925→				resp.Offline = make(map[string]string, 1)
  4926→			}
  4927→			resp.Offline[o.name] = o.offlineReason
  4928→			missingNames = append(missingNames, o.name)
  4929→			continue
  4930→		}
  4931→		if cinfo := o.info(); cinfo != nil {
  4932→			resp.Consumers = append(resp.Consumers, cinfo)
  4933→		}
  4934→		if len(resp.Consumers) >= JSApiListLimit {
  4935→			break
  4936→		}
  4937→	}
  4938→	resp.Total = ocnt
  4939→	resp.Limit = JSApiListLimit
  4940→	resp.Offset = offset
  4941→	resp.Missing = missingNames
  4942→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  4943→}
  4944→
  4945→// Request for information about an consumer.
  4946→func (s *Server) jsConsumerInfoRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  4947→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  4948→		return
  4949→	}
  4950→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  4951→	if err != nil {
  4952→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  4953→		return
  4954→	}
  4955→
  4956→	streamName := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  4957→	consumerName := consumerNameFromSubject(subject)
  4958→
  4959→	var resp = JSApiConsumerInfoResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerInfoResponseType}}
  4960→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  4961→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  4962→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4963→		return
  4964→	}
  4965→
  4966→	if !isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  4967→		resp.Error = NewJSNotEmptyRequestError()
  4968→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  4969→		return
  4970→	}
  4971→
  4972→	// If we are in clustered mode we need to be the consumer leader to proceed.
  4973→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  4974→		// Check to make sure the consumer is assigned.
  4975→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  4976→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  4977→			return
  4978→		}
  4979→
  4980→		js.mu.RLock()
  4981→		meta := cc.meta
  4982→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  4983→
  4984→		// Since these could wait on the Raft group lock, don't do so under the JS lock.
  4985→		ourID := meta.ID()
  4986→		groupLeaderless := meta.Leaderless()
  4987→		groupCreated := meta.Created()
  4988→
  4989→		js.mu.RLock()
  4990→		isLeader, sa, ca := cc.isLeader(), js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, streamName), js.consumerAssignment(acc.Name, streamName, consumerName)
  4991→		var rg *raftGroup
  4992→		var offline, isMember bool
  4993→		if ca != nil {
  4994→			if rg = ca.Group; rg != nil {
  4995→				offline = s.allPeersOffline(rg)
  4996→				isMember = rg.isMember(ourID)
  4997→			}
  4998→			if ca.unsupported != nil && isMember {
  4999→				// If we're a member for this consumer, and it's not supported, report it as offline.
  5000→				resp.Error = NewJSConsumerOfflineReasonError(errors.New(ca.unsupported.reason))
  5001→				s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  5002→				js.mu.RUnlock()
  5003→				return
  5004→			}
  5005→		}
  5006→		// Capture consumer leader here.
  5007→		isConsumerLeader := cc.isConsumerLeader(acc.Name, streamName, consumerName)
  5008→		// Also capture if we think there is no meta leader.
  5009→		var isLeaderLess bool
  5010→		if !isLeader {
  5011→			isLeaderLess = groupLeaderless && time.Since(groupCreated) > lostQuorumIntervalDefault
  5012→		}
  5013→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  5014→
  5015→		if isLeader && ca == nil {
  5016→			// We can't find the consumer, so mimic what would be the errors below.
  5017→			if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  5018→				if doErr {
  5019→					resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  5020→					s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5021→				}
  5022→				return
  5023→			}
  5024→			if sa == nil {
  5025→				resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError()
  5026→				s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5027→				return
  5028→			}
  5029→			// If we are here the consumer is not present.
  5030→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  5031→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5032→			return
  5033→		} else if ca == nil {
  5034→			if isLeaderLess {
  5035→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  5036→				// Delaying an error response gives the leader a chance to respond before us
  5037→				s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  5038→			}
  5039→			return
  5040→		} else if isLeader && offline {
  5041→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerOfflineError()
  5042→			s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  5043→			return
  5044→		}
  5045→
  5046→		// Check to see if we are a member of the group and if the group has no leader.
  5047→		if isMember && js.isGroupLeaderless(ca.Group) {
  5048→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  5049→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5050→			return
  5051→		}
  5052→
  5053→		// We have the consumer assigned and a leader, so only the consumer leader should answer.
  5054→		if !isConsumerLeader {
  5055→			if isLeaderLess {
  5056→				resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  5057→				// Delaying an error response gives the leader a chance to respond before us
  5058→				s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), ca.Group, errRespDelay)
  5059→				return
  5060→			}
  5061→
  5062→			var node RaftNode
  5063→			var leaderNotPartOfGroup bool
  5064→
  5065→			// We have a consumer assignment.
  5066→			if isMember {
  5067→				js.mu.RLock()
  5068→				if rg != nil && rg.node != nil {
  5069→					node = rg.node
  5070→					if gl := node.GroupLeader(); gl != _EMPTY_ && !rg.isMember(gl) {
  5071→						leaderNotPartOfGroup = true
  5072→					}
  5073→				}
  5074→				js.mu.RUnlock()
  5075→			}
  5076→
  5077→			// Check if we should ignore all together.
  5078→			if node == nil {
  5079→				// We have been assigned but have not created a node yet. If we are a member return
  5080→				// our config and defaults for state and no cluster info.
  5081→				if isMember {
  5082→					// Since we access consumerAssignment, need js lock.
  5083→					js.mu.RLock()
  5084→					resp.ConsumerInfo = &ConsumerInfo{
  5085→						Stream:    ca.Stream,
  5086→						Name:      ca.Name,
  5087→						Created:   ca.Created,
  5088→						Config:    setDynamicConsumerMetadata(ca.Config),
  5089→						TimeStamp: time.Now().UTC(),
  5090→					}
  5091→					b := s.jsonResponse(resp)
  5092→					js.mu.RUnlock()
  5093→					s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), b)
  5094→				}
  5095→				return
  5096→			}
  5097→			// If we are a member and we have a group leader or we had a previous leader consider bailing out.
  5098→			if !node.Leaderless() || node.HadPreviousLeader() || (rg != nil && rg.Preferred != _EMPTY_ && rg.Preferred != ourID) {
  5099→				if leaderNotPartOfGroup {
  5100→					resp.Error = NewJSConsumerOfflineError()
  5101→					s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  5102→				}
  5103→				return
  5104→			}
  5105→			// If we are here we are a member and this is just a new consumer that does not have a (preferred) leader yet.
  5106→			// Will fall through and return what we have. All consumers can respond but this should be very rare
  5107→			// but makes more sense to clients when they try to create, get a consumer exists, and then do consumer info.
  5108→		}
  5109→	}
  5110→
  5111→	if !acc.JetStreamEnabled() {
  5112→		resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  5113→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5114→		return
  5115→	}
  5116→
  5117→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(streamName)
  5118→	if err != nil {
  5119→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  5120→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5121→		return
  5122→	}
  5123→
  5124→	obs := mset.lookupConsumer(consumerName)
  5125→	if obs == nil {
  5126→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  5127→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5128→		return
  5129→	}
  5130→
  5131→	if obs.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  5132→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerOfflineReasonError(errors.New(obs.offlineReason))
  5133→		s.sendDelayedAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp), nil, errRespDelay)
  5134→		return
  5135→	}
  5136→
  5137→	if resp.ConsumerInfo = setDynamicConsumerInfoMetadata(obs.info()); resp.ConsumerInfo == nil {
  5138→		// This consumer returned nil which means it's closed. Respond with not found.
  5139→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  5140→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5141→		return
  5142→	}
  5143→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  5144→}
  5145→
  5146→// Request to delete an Consumer.
  5147→func (s *Server) jsConsumerDeleteRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  5148→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  5149→		return
  5150→	}
  5151→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  5152→	if err != nil {
  5153→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  5154→		return
  5155→	}
  5156→
  5157→	var resp = JSApiConsumerDeleteResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerDeleteResponseType}}
  5158→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  5159→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  5160→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5161→		return
  5162→	}
  5163→
  5164→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  5165→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  5166→		js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  5167→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  5168→			return
  5169→		}
  5170→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  5171→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  5172→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5173→			return
  5174→		}
  5175→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  5176→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  5177→			return
  5178→		}
  5179→	}
  5180→
  5181→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  5182→		if doErr {
  5183→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  5184→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5185→		}
  5186→		return
  5187→	}
  5188→	if !isEmptyRequest(msg) {
  5189→		resp.Error = NewJSNotEmptyRequestError()
  5190→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5191→		return
  5192→	}
  5193→	stream := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  5194→	consumer := consumerNameFromSubject(subject)
  5195→
  5196→	if s.JetStreamIsClustered() {
  5197→		s.jsClusteredConsumerDeleteRequest(ci, acc, stream, consumer, subject, reply, rmsg)
  5198→		return
  5199→	}
  5200→
  5201→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  5202→	if err != nil {
  5203→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  5204→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5205→		return
  5206→	}
  5207→
  5208→	obs := mset.lookupConsumer(consumer)
  5209→	if obs == nil {
  5210→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  5211→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5212→		return
  5213→	}
  5214→	if err := obs.delete(); err != nil {
  5215→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamGeneralError(err, Unless(err))
  5216→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5217→		return
  5218→	}
  5219→	resp.Success = true
  5220→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  5221→}
  5222→
  5223→// Request to pause or unpause a Consumer.
  5224→func (s *Server) jsConsumerPauseRequest(sub *subscription, c *client, _ *Account, subject, reply string, rmsg []byte) {
  5225→	if c == nil || !s.JetStreamEnabled() {
  5226→		return
  5227→	}
  5228→	ci, acc, hdr, msg, err := s.getRequestInfo(c, rmsg)
  5229→	if err != nil {
  5230→		s.Warnf(badAPIRequestT, msg)
  5231→		return
  5232→	}
  5233→
  5234→	var req JSApiConsumerPauseRequest
  5235→	var resp = JSApiConsumerPauseResponse{ApiResponse: ApiResponse{Type: JSApiConsumerPauseResponseType}}
  5236→	if errorOnRequiredApiLevel(hdr) {
  5237→		resp.Error = NewJSRequiredApiLevelError()
  5238→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5239→		return
  5240→	}
  5241→
  5242→	if isJSONObjectOrArray(msg) {
  5243→		if err := s.unmarshalRequest(c, acc, subject, msg, &req); err != nil {
  5244→			resp.Error = NewJSInvalidJSONError(err)
  5245→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5246→			return
  5247→		}
  5248→	}
  5249→
  5250→	// Determine if we should proceed here when we are in clustered mode.
  5251→	isClustered := s.JetStreamIsClustered()
  5252→	js, cc := s.getJetStreamCluster()
  5253→	if isClustered {
  5254→		if js == nil || cc == nil {
  5255→			return
  5256→		}
  5257→		if js.isLeaderless() {
  5258→			resp.Error = NewJSClusterNotAvailError()
  5259→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5260→			return
  5261→		}
  5262→		// Make sure we are meta leader.
  5263→		if !s.JetStreamIsLeader() {
  5264→			return
  5265→		}
  5266→	}
  5267→
  5268→	if hasJS, doErr := acc.checkJetStream(); !hasJS {
  5269→		if doErr {
  5270→			resp.Error = NewJSNotEnabledForAccountError()
  5271→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5272→		}
  5273→		return
  5274→	}
  5275→
  5276→	stream := streamNameFromSubject(subject)
  5277→	consumer := consumerNameFromSubject(subject)
  5278→
  5279→	if isClustered {
  5280→		js.mu.RLock()
  5281→		sa := js.streamAssignment(acc.Name, stream)
  5282→		if sa == nil {
  5283→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  5284→			resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  5285→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5286→			return
  5287→		}
  5288→		if sa.unsupported != nil {
  5289→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  5290→			// Just let the request time out.
  5291→			return
  5292→		}
  5293→
  5294→		ca, ok := sa.consumers[consumer]
  5295→		if !ok || ca == nil {
  5296→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  5297→			resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  5298→			s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5299→			return
  5300→		}
  5301→		if ca.unsupported != nil {
  5302→			js.mu.RUnlock()
  5303→			// Just let the request time out.
  5304→			return
  5305→		}
  5306→
  5307→		nca := *ca
  5308→		ncfg := *ca.Config
  5309→		nca.Config = &ncfg
  5310→		js.mu.RUnlock()
  5311→		pauseUTC := req.PauseUntil.UTC()
  5312→		if !pauseUTC.IsZero() {
  5313→			nca.Config.PauseUntil = &pauseUTC
  5314→		} else {
  5315→			nca.Config.PauseUntil = nil
  5316→		}
  5317→
  5318→		// Update asset version metadata due to updating pause/resume.
  5319→		// Only PauseUntil is updated above, so reuse config for both.
  5320→		setStaticConsumerMetadata(nca.Config)
  5321→
  5322→		eca := encodeAddConsumerAssignment(&nca)
  5323→		cc.meta.Propose(eca)
  5324→
  5325→		resp.PauseUntil = pauseUTC
  5326→		if resp.Paused = time.Now().Before(pauseUTC); resp.Paused {
  5327→			resp.PauseRemaining = time.Until(pauseUTC)
  5328→		}
  5329→		s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  5330→		return
  5331→	}
  5332→
  5333→	mset, err := acc.lookupStream(stream)
  5334→	if err != nil {
  5335→		resp.Error = NewJSStreamNotFoundError(Unless(err))
  5336→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5337→		return
  5338→	}
  5339→	if mset.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  5340→		// Just let the request time out.
  5341→		return
  5342→	}
  5343→
  5344→	obs := mset.lookupConsumer(consumer)
  5345→	if obs == nil {
  5346→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerNotFoundError()
  5347→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5348→		return
  5349→	}
  5350→	if obs.offlineReason != _EMPTY_ {
  5351→		// Just let the request time out.
  5352→		return
  5353→	}
  5354→
  5355→	ncfg := obs.cfg
  5356→	pauseUTC := req.PauseUntil.UTC()
  5357→	if !pauseUTC.IsZero() {
  5358→		ncfg.PauseUntil = &pauseUTC
  5359→	} else {
  5360→		ncfg.PauseUntil = nil
  5361→	}
  5362→
  5363→	// Update asset version metadata due to updating pause/resume.
  5364→	setStaticConsumerMetadata(&ncfg)
  5365→
  5366→	if err := obs.updateConfig(&ncfg); err != nil {
  5367→		// The only type of error that should be returned here is from o.store,
  5368→		// so use a store failed error type.
  5369→		resp.Error = NewJSConsumerStoreFailedError(err)
  5370→		s.sendAPIErrResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(&resp))
  5371→		return
  5372→	}
  5373→
  5374→	resp.PauseUntil = pauseUTC
  5375→	if resp.Paused = time.Now().Before(pauseUTC); resp.Paused {
  5376→		resp.PauseRemaining = time.Until(pauseUTC)
  5377→	}
  5378→	s.sendAPIResponse(ci, acc, subject, reply, string(msg), s.jsonResponse(resp))
  5379→}
  5380→
  5381→// sendJetStreamAPIAuditAdvisory will send the audit event for a given event.
  5382→func (s *Server) sendJetStreamAPIAuditAdvisory(ci *ClientInfo, acc *Account, subject, request, response string) {
  5383→	s.publishAdvisory(acc, JSAuditAdvisory, JSAPIAudit{
  5384→		TypedEvent: TypedEvent{
  5385→			Type: JSAPIAuditType,
  5386→			ID:   nuid.Next(),
  5387→			Time: time.Now().UTC(),
  5388→		},
  5389→		Server:   s.Name(),
  5390→		Client:   ci.forAdvisory(),
  5391→		Subject:  subject,
  5392→		Request:  request,
  5393→		Response: response,
  5394→		Domain:   s.getOpts().JetStreamDomain,
  5395→	})
  5396→}

   159→type ConsumerAction int
   160→
   161→const (
   162→	ActionCreateOrUpdate ConsumerAction = iota
   163→	ActionUpdate
   164→	ActionCreate
   165→)
   166→
   167→const (
   168→	actionUpdateJSONString         = `"update"`
   169→	actionCreateJSONString         = `"create"`
   170→	actionCreateOrUpdateJSONString = `""`

   172→
   173→var (
   174→	actionUpdateJSONBytes         = []byte(actionUpdateJSONString)
   175→	actionCreateJSONBytes         = []byte(actionCreateJSONString)

   178→
   179→func (a ConsumerAction) String() string {
   180→	switch a {
   181→	case ActionCreateOrUpdate:
   182→		return actionCreateOrUpdateJSONString
   183→	case ActionCreate:
   184→		return actionCreateJSONString
   185→	case ActionUpdate:
   186→		return actionUpdateJSONString
   187→	}
   188→	return actionCreateOrUpdateJSONString
   189→}
   190→
   191→func (a ConsumerAction) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {
   192→	switch a {
   193→	case ActionCreate:
   194→		return actionCreateJSONBytes, nil
   195→	case ActionUpdate:
   196→		return actionUpdateJSONBytes, nil
   197→	case ActionCreateOrUpdate:
   198→		return actionCreateOrUpdateJSONBytes, nil
   199→	default:
   200→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("can not marshal %v", a)
   201→	}
   202→}
   203→
   204→func (a *ConsumerAction) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {
   205→	switch string(data) {
   206→	case actionCreateJSONString:
   207→		*a = ActionCreate
   208→	case actionUpdateJSONString:
   209→		*a = ActionUpdate
   210→	case actionCreateOrUpdateJSONString:
   211→		*a = ActionCreateOrUpdate
   212→	default:
   213→		return fmt.Errorf("unknown consumer action: %v", string(data))
   214→	}
   215→	return nil
   216→}

   238→	PriorityNoneJSONString         = `"none"`

   248→	PriorityPrioritizedJSONBytes  = []byte(PriorityPrioritizedJSONString)

   251→func (pp PriorityPolicy) String() string {

   253→	case PriorityOverflow:

   255→	case PriorityPinnedClient:

   257→	case PriorityPrioritized:

   263→
   264→func (pp PriorityPolicy) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {

   266→	case PriorityOverflow:

   268→	case PriorityPinnedClient:

   270→	case PriorityPrioritized:

   274→	default:

   279→func (pp *PriorityPolicy) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {
   280→	switch string(data) {

   283→	case PriorityPinnedClientJSONString:

   295→// DeliverPolicy determines how the consumer should select the first message to deliver.
   296→type DeliverPolicy int
   297→
   298→const (
   299→	// DeliverAll will be the default so can be omitted from the request.
   300→	DeliverAll DeliverPolicy = iota
   301→	// DeliverLast will start the consumer with the last sequence received.
   302→	DeliverLast
   303→	// DeliverNew will only deliver new messages that are sent after the consumer is created.
   304→	DeliverNew
   305→	// DeliverByStartSequence will look for a defined starting sequence to start.
   306→	DeliverByStartSequence
   307→	// DeliverByStartTime will select the first messsage with a timestamp >= to StartTime.
   308→	DeliverByStartTime
   309→	// DeliverLastPerSubject will start the consumer with the last message for all subjects received.
   310→	DeliverLastPerSubject
   311→)
   312→
   313→func (dp DeliverPolicy) String() string {
   314→	switch dp {
   315→	case DeliverAll:
   316→		return "all"
   317→	case DeliverLast:
   318→		return "last"
   319→	case DeliverNew:
   320→		return "new"
   321→	case DeliverByStartSequence:
   322→		return "by_start_sequence"
   323→	case DeliverByStartTime:
   324→		return "by_start_time"
   325→	case DeliverLastPerSubject:
   326→		return "last_per_subject"
   327→	default:
   328→		return "undefined"
   329→	}
   330→}

   332→// AckPolicy determines how the consumer should acknowledge delivered messages.
   333→type AckPolicy int
   334→
   335→const (
   336→	// AckNone requires no acks for delivered messages.

   338→	// AckAll when acking a sequence number, this implicitly acks all sequences below this one as well.

   340→	// AckExplicit requires ack or nack for all messages.
   341→	AckExplicit

   344→func (a AckPolicy) String() string {

   348→	case AckAll:
   349→		return "all"
   350→	default:
   351→		return "explicit"

   355→// ReplayPolicy determines how the consumer should replay messages it already has queued in the stream.

   374→// OK

   376→
   377→// Ack responses. Note that a nil or no payload is same as AckAck
   378→var (
   379→	// Ack
   380→	AckAck = []byte("+ACK") // nil or no payload to ack subject also means ACK
   381→	AckOK  = []byte(OK)     // deprecated but +OK meant ack as well.
   382→
   383→	// Nack
   384→	AckNak = []byte("-NAK")
   385→	// Progress indicator
   386→	AckProgress = []byte("+WPI")
   387→	// Ack + Deliver the next message(s).
   388→	AckNext = []byte("+NXT")
   389→	// Terminate delivery of the message.
   390→	AckTerm = []byte("+TERM")
   391→)

   396→	ackTermUnackedLimitsReason = "Unacknowledged message was deleted"

   399→// Calculate accurate replicas for the consumer config with the parent stream config.
   400→func (consCfg ConsumerConfig) replicas(strCfg *StreamConfig) int {
   401→	if consCfg.Replicas == 0 || consCfg.Replicas > strCfg.Replicas {
   402→		if !isDurableConsumer(&consCfg) && strCfg.Retention == LimitsPolicy && consCfg.Replicas == 0 {
   403→			// Matches old-school ephemerals only, where the replica count is 0.
   404→			return 1
   405→		}
   406→		return strCfg.Replicas
   407→	}
   408→	return consCfg.Replicas
   409→}

   537→// subjects is a helper function used for updating consumers.
   538→// It is not used and should not be used in hotpath.
   539→func (s subjectFilters) subjects() []string {
   540→	subjects := make([]string, 0, len(s))

   552→const (
   553→	// JsAckWaitDefault is the default AckWait, only applicable on explicit ack policy consumers.
   554→	JsAckWaitDefault = 30 * time.Second
   555→	// JsDeleteWaitTimeDefault is the default amount of time we will wait for non-durable
   556→	// consumers to be in an inactive state before deleting them.
   557→	JsDeleteWaitTimeDefault = 5 * time.Second
   558→	// JsFlowControlMaxPending specifies default pending bytes during flow control that can be outstanding.
   559→	JsFlowControlMaxPending = 32 * 1024 * 1024
   560→	// JsDefaultMaxAckPending is set for consumers with explicit ack that do not set the max ack pending.
   561→	JsDefaultMaxAckPending = 1000

   563→	// is picked by a server.
   564→	JsDefaultPinnedTTL = 2 * time.Minute
